## MPSC Assistant Professor Answer Key 2026 Released!

The Maharashtra Public Service Commission (MPSC) has released the provisional answer key for the Assistant Professor examination (various subjects under Maharashtra Engineering Teachers Services, Group-A - Screening test).

**Key Details:**

*   **Organization:** Maharashtra Public Service Commission (MPSC)
*   **Post Name:** Assistant Professor
*   **Exam Date:** Various (Screening Test dates as per Advt. No. 048/2023 etc.)
*   **Answer Key Status:** Released
*   **Release Date:** 2nd March 2026
*   **Objection Deadline:** Check announcement on [mpsc.gov.in](mpsc.gov.in) (typically a few days after release)
*   **Official Website:** [mpsc.gov.in](mpsc.gov.in)

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit [mpsc.gov.in](mpsc.gov.in).
2.  Navigate to the "Answer Keys of Examinations" section under Candidate Information.
3.  Click on the relevant "Assistant Professor ... First Answer Key" link (e.g., for Material Science, Chemistry etc.).
4.  Download the PDF.

**How to Raise an Objection:**

1.  Visit [mpsc.gov.in](mpsc.gov.in) and check the related announcement.
2.  Go to the "Challenge/Objection" section.
3.  Select the question(s) to challenge.
4.  Upload supporting documents (if required).
5.  Pay the objection fee (if applicable).
6.  Submit before the deadline.

**Important Dates:**

*   Exam Conducted: Various
*   Answer Key Released: 2nd March 2026
*   Objection Deadline: As per announcement on mpsc.gov.in

**Scoring:**

Total Score = (Correct Answers × Marks per Question) – (Wrong Answers × Negative Marking)

website_content.title: FSSAI Food Analyst Admit Card 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## FSSAI Food Analyst Admit Card 2026 - Download Now!

The Food Safety and Standards Authority of India (FSSAI) has released the admit card for the 11th Food Analyst Examination (FAE) 2025 (2026 cycle). Candidates who applied for the Food Analyst certification can download their hall ticket.

**Key Details:**

*   **Release Date:** 24 February 2026
*   **Exam Date:** 8 March 2026
*   **Exam Type:** 11th Food Analyst Examination (CBT)
*   **Official Website:** fssai.gov.in / fssai.formsubmit.in

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit the official portal: fssai.formsubmit.in/ep_ses_web_landing
2.  Navigate to the admit card section.
3.  Enter your User ID/Registration Number, Password/Date of Birth, and Captcha Code.
4.  Download and save the PDF.
5.  Print 2-3 copies for exam day.

**Important Documents to Carry:**

*   Admit Card (printed copy)
*   Valid Photo ID (Aadhaar, Voter ID, Driving License, PAN Card, Passport)
*   Recent passport-size photographs (2 copies)
*   Blue/Black ballpoint pen

**Pro Tip:** Check all details on your admit card immediately after download and report any discrepancies to FSSAI helpdesk (faexam.qa@fssai.gov.in) within 24 hours.

website_content.title: RRB Section Controller Answer Key 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## RRB Section Controller Answer Key 2026 Released

The Railway Recruitment Board (RRB) has released the provisional answer key for the Section Controller examination held on **11-12 February 2026**. Candidates can download the answer key from the official website.

**Key Details:**

*   **Organization:** Railway Recruitment Board (RRB)
*   **Post Name:** Section Controller
*   **Total Vacancies:** 368
*   **Exam Date:** 11-12 February 2026
*   **Answer Key Status:** Released (26 February 2026)
*   **Last Date for Objection:** 5 March 2026
*   **Objection Fee:** ₹XX per question (refundable if accepted)

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit [rrbcdg.gov.in](rrbcdg.gov.in).
2.  Navigate to the "Answer Key" or "Recruitment" section.
3.  Click on "RRB Section Controller Answer Key 2026".
4.  Login with Registration Number and Password/Date of Birth.
5.  Download the PDF.

**How to Raise Objection:**

1.  Login to your candidate portal on [rrbcdg.gov.in](rrbcdg.gov.in).
2.  Go to the "Challenge/Objection" section.
3.  Select the question(s) to challenge.
4.  Upload supporting documents (if required).
5.  Pay the objection fee.
6.  Submit before 5 March 2026.

**Marking Scheme:**

*   Correct Answer: +1 mark
*   Wrong Answer: -1/3 mark
*   Unattempted: 0 marks

website_content.title: JPSC Civil Services Exam 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## JPSC Civil Services Syllabus 2026

The Jharkhand Public Service Commission (JPSC) has released the detailed syllabus for the Civil Services (Combined Competitive) Exam 2026. Candidates preparing for the JPSC Civil Services recruitment can download the syllabus PDF, exam pattern, and marking scheme.

**Exam Overview:**

*   **Exam Name:** JPSC Combined Civil Services Exam 2026
*   **Conducting Body:** Jharkhand Public Service Commission (JPSC)
*   **Post Name:** Civil Services (Administrative, Police, etc.) & Allied Services
*   **Exam Mode:** Offline (Prelims: Objective, Mains: Descriptive)
*   **Exam Type:** Objective (Prelims), Descriptive (Mains)
*   **Total Questions (Prelims):** 200 (100 each paper)
*   **Total Marks (Prelims):** 400
*   **Total Marks (Mains):** 950
*   **Interview:** 100 marks
*   **Exam Duration (Prelims):** 4 Hours (2+2)
*   **Exam Duration (Mains):** 3 Hours per paper
*   **Negative Marking:** No
*   **Selection Process:** Preliminary Exam + Main Written Exam + Interview
*   **Exam Language:** English / Hindi

**Exam Pattern:**

**Prelims (Objective):**

| Paper | Subject | Marks | Duration |
|---|---|---|---|
| Paper I | General Studies I | 200 | 2 Hours |
| Paper II | General Studies II (Jharkhand Specific + CSAT) | 200 | 2 Hours |

**Mains (Descriptive):**

| Paper | Subject | Marks | Duration |
|---|---|---|---|
| Paper I | General Hindi & General English (Qualifying) | 100 (50+50) | 3 Hours |
| Paper II | Language and Literature | 150 | 3 Hours |
| Paper III | Social Sciences (History & Geography) | 200 | 3 Hours |
| Paper IV | Indian Constitution & Polity, Public Administration | 200 | 3 Hours |
| Paper V | Indian Economy, Globalization & Sustainable Development | 200 | 3 Hours |
| Paper VI | General Sciences, Environment & Technology | 200 | 3 Hours |

**Key Points:**
* Prelims is a screening test; marks are not counted in the final merit.
* Mains total 950 marks (Paper I is qualifying).
* No negative marking in Prelims.

Download the official syllabus PDF for detailed subject-wise topics and preparation tips.

website_content.title: WBSSC Group D Syllabus 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## WBSSC Group D Syllabus 2026

The West Bengal Central School Service Commission (WBSSC) has released the detailed syllabus for the Group D Exam 2026. This guide covers the exam pattern, marking scheme, and subject-wise topics.

**Exam Overview:**

*   **Exam Name:** WBSSC Group D Exam 2026
*   **Conducting Body:** West Bengal Central School Service Commission (WBSSC)
*   **Post Name:** Group D
*   **Exam Mode:** Offline (OMR-based Written Exam)
*   **Exam Type:** Objective (MCQ)
*   **Total Questions:** 45
*   **Total Marks:** 45
*   **Exam Duration:** 1 Hour
*   **Negative Marking:** No
*   **Selection Process:** Written Exam + Interview
*   **Exam Language:** English/Bengali

**Exam Pattern:**

| Subject/Section | No. of Questions | Marks | Duration |
|---|---|---|---|
| General Knowledge | 15 | 15 | 1 Hour |
| Current Affairs | 15 | 15 | |
| Arithmetic | 15 | 15 | |
| **Total** | **45** | **45** | |

**Syllabus Breakdown:**

1.  **General Knowledge:** Environment and society.
2.  **Current Affairs:** West Bengal and Indian events (sports, history, culture, geography).
3.  **Arithmetic:** Number systems, simplification, decimals, fractions, LCM, HCF, averages, ratio and proportion, percentage, profit and loss, discount, simple interest, time and work, time and distance (Class 8 level).

**Preparation Tips:**

*   Understand the syllabus and exam pattern.
*   Create a study timetable.
*   Use standard reference books.
*   Practice previous year question papers.
*   Take regular mock tests.
*   Stay updated on current affairs.

**Recommended Books:**

*   **General Knowledge:** Lucent's General Knowledge / West Bengal GK
*   **Current Affairs:** Pratiyogita Darpan / Monthly Magazines
*   **Arithmetic:** Quantitative Aptitude for Competitive Examinations (Basic Level) - R.S. Aggarwal

website_content.title: GSSSB Clerk Recruitment 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## GSSSB Clerk Syllabus 2026

The Gujarat Subordinate Service Selection Board (GSSSB) has released the detailed syllabus for the Clerk Exam 2026. This guide covers the exam pattern, marking scheme, and subject-wise topics.

**Exam Overview:**

*   **Exam Name:** GSSSB Clerk Exam 2026 (Combined Competitive Exam - Class III)
*   **Conducting Body:** Gujarat Subordinate Service Selection Board (GSSSB)
*   **Post Name:** Clerk (Junior Clerk, Head Clerk, and Other Class-III Posts)
*   **Total Vacancies:** 5370 Posts (Combined for Group A & B)
*   **Exam Mode:** Online (Computer-Based Test)
*   **Exam Type:** Objective (MCQ)
*   **Total Questions:** 100
*   **Total Marks:** 100
*   **Exam Duration:** 1 Hour
*   **Negative Marking:** Yes (0.25 marks deducted for each wrong answer)
*   **Selection Process:** Prelims Exam + Mains Exam + Document Verification
*   **Exam Language:** Gujarati (Parts A, B, D) / English (Part C)

**Exam Pattern (Prelims):**

| Part | Subject             | No. of Questions | Marks | Duration |
|------|---------------------|------------------|-------|----------|
| A    | Reasoning           | 40               | 40    | 1 Hour   |
| B    | Quantitative Aptitude | 30               | 30    |          |
| C    | English             | 15               | 15    |          |
| D    | Gujarati            | 15               | 15    |          |
| Total|                     | 100              | 100   |          |

**Key Topics:**

*   **Reasoning:** Blood Relations, Data Interpretation, Venn Diagram
*   **Quantitative Aptitude:** Percentage, Profit & Loss, Time & Work, Ratio & Proportion
*   **English:** Comprehension, Tenses, Translation
*   **Gujarati:** Vocabulary, Error Detection, Comprehension

**Preparation Tips:**

*   Understand the syllabus and exam pattern.
*   Create a realistic study timetable.
*   Practice previous year question papers.
*   Take regular mock tests.

website_content.title: IIT JAM 2026 Answer Key Released
website_content.markdown_content:
## IIT JAM 2026 Answer Key – Important Updates!

The provisional answer key for IIT JAM 2026 has been released by IIT Bombay on February 24, 2026. Candidates can download it from the JOAPS portal: [joaps.iitb.ac.in](joaps.iitb.ac.in) (linked from [jam2026.iitb.ac.in](jam2026.iitb.ac.in)).

**Key Details:**

*   **Release Date:** February 24, 2026
*   **Objection Window:** Open until 11:59:59 PM on February 27, 2026
*   **Result Date:** March 20, 2026
*   **Objection Fee:** Typically ₹500 per question (refundable if accepted).

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit [jam2026.iitb.ac.in](jam2026.iitb.ac.in).
2.  Login to JOAPS.
3.  Locate and download the answer key PDF.

**Score Calculation:**

*   **Section A (MCQs):** 10 x 1 mark + 20 x 2 marks (-1/3 negative marking for wrong answers)
*   **Section B (MSQs):** No negative marking
*   **Section C (NAT):** No negative marking

Don't miss the deadline to raise objections!

website_content.title: UPSC CSE Final Result 2025
website_content.markdown_content:
## UPSC CSE Final Result 2025 OUT! 

The Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) has released the final result for the Civil Services Examination (CSE) 2025 on **March 6, 2026**. Candidates can download the merit list PDF directly from the official portal, upsc.gov.in (no login required).

**Key Details:**

*   **Recruiting Body:** Union Public Service Commission (UPSC)
*   **Exam Name:** Civil Services Examination (CSE) 2025
*   **Result Type:** Final Result (Merit List)
*   **Declaration Date:** March 6, 2026
*   **Selection Stages:** Prelims → Mains → Personality Test
*   **Total Recommended Candidates:** 958
*   **Vacancies (Revised):** 1087
*   **Reserve List:** 258 candidates
*   **Topper (AIR 1):** Anuj Agnihotri

**Merit List Contains:**

*   Roll Number
*   Candidate Name
*   Rank (All India Rank - AIR)
*   Category (if applicable)
*   Recommended Services (IAS, IPS, IFS, etc.)
*   Qualifying Status

**Important Instructions:**

*   Download and save the merit list PDF.
*   Await service allocation details from DoPT.
*   Prepare for training at respective academies.
*   Keep original documents ready for verification.
*   Marksheet to be released later.

**Post Name:** Group-5 Staff Nurse, Paramedical Staff & Other Equivalent Posts

**Total Vacancies:** 291

**Salary:** ₹15,500/- to ₹91,300/- per month (Level 1 to Level 7, varies by post)

*   **Application Start:** 13/03/2026
*   **Application End:** 27/03/2026

**Key Details:**

*   **Exam Date:** 16 March to 27 March 2026
*   **Total Vacancies:** 5810 Posts (Graduate Level)

**How to Download Admit Card:**

1.  Visit the official RRB website or your regional RRB site.

**Important Documents to Carry:**

*   Admit Card (printed copy)

*   Recent passport-size photographs (if required)

**Important Instructions:**

*   Mobile phones, smartwatches, calculators, books, and bags are not allowed in the examination hall.
*   Reach the center at least 1 hour before the exam.

website_content.markdown_content:
## Karnataka 2nd PUC Hindi Exam 2026 - Key Information

The Karnataka 2nd PUC Hindi exam 2026 was held on **March 12, 2026**, from 10:15 AM to 1:30 PM.

**Key Details:**

*   **Exam Date & Time:** March 12, 2026 | 10:15 AM – 1:30 PM
*   **Total Marks:** 80 (Theory) + 20 (Internal) = 100
*   **Passing Marks:** Minimum 35% overall; ~28/80 in theory
*   **Question Pattern:**
    *   Part A: Objective/very short (20 marks)
    *   Part B: Short answers (12 marks)
    *   Part C: Annotations/explanations (18 marks)
    *   Part D: Long answers (20 marks)
    *   Part E: Grammar & Composition (10 marks)

**Unofficial Answer Key 2026:**

*   **Status:** Announced

**Why Refer to the Unofficial Answer Key?**

*   Instant score estimation.
*   Identify strengths and weaknesses.
*   Mental preparation for results (expected April/May 2026).

**Difficulty Level (Student Feedback):**

*   **Overall:** Moderate to balanced.
*   **Easy:** Objective questions, familiar poems/prose.
*   **Moderate:** Annotations.
*   **Challenging:** Long answers (Katha Sindhu), composition.

### Question Paper Structure:

*   **Section A:** Reading Comprehension (22 marks)
*   **Section B:** Creative Writing Skills (18 marks)

*   April 10, 2026: Legal Studies (Rescheduled)

website_content.title: TS Inter 1st Year Chemistry Exam 2026 - Answer Key & Details
website_content.markdown_content:
## TS Inter 1st Year Chemistry Exam 2026 - Overview

**Exam Date:** March 12, 2026
**Mode:** Offline (Pen and Paper)
**Duration:** 3 Hours
**Total Marks:** 60 (Theory)

**Question Paper Structure:**

*   **Section A:** 10 Very Short Answer Questions (2 marks each = 20 marks) – All compulsory.
*   **Section B:** 8 Short Answer Questions (attempt any 6, 4 marks each = 24 marks).
*   **Section C:** 3 Long Answer Questions (attempt any 2, 8 marks each = 16 marks).

**Syllabus Coverage:** Atomic Structure, Periodic Classification, Chemical Bonding, States of Matter, Stoichiometry, Hydrogen & its Compounds, Alkali & Alkaline Earth Metals, Organic Chemistry basics, Hydrocarbons, etc.

## TS Inter 1st Year Chemistry Answer Key 2026 (Unofficial)

The unofficial answer key helps students verify their responses and estimate their performance. Experts release answer keys for all sections (VSAQ, SAQ, LAQ) shortly after the exam.

**How to Use:**

*   Compare your answers step-by-step.
*   For 2-mark questions: Focus on definitions, reasons, and short explanations.
*   For 4-mark questions: Include diagrams, equations, and key points.
*   For 8-mark questions: Provide detailed derivations, mechanisms, or properties with examples.

**Score Estimation:**

*   Download the unofficial answer key from expert sources.
*   Match your answers accurately (award partial marks for steps in numericals).
*   Aim for 35+ to be safe (passing marks vary but usually around 21-25/60).
*   Cross-verify with friends or teachers.

## TS Inter 1st Year Time Table 2026 (Partial)

| Exam Date      | Day       | Subject(s)                      | Time          |
|----------------|-----------|---------------------------------|---------------|
| 25 February 2026 | Wednesday | Second Language Paper-I         | 9:00 AM – 12:00 PM |
| 12 March 2026   | Thursday  | Chemistry Paper-I / Commerce Paper-I | 9:00 AM – 12:00 PM |

| **Total Vacancies**| 883 Posts   | 
| **Exam Mode**      | Offline     | 
| **Exam Type**      | Objective (MCQ) | 
| **Total Questions**| 100         | 
| **Total Marks**    | 200         | 
| **Exam Duration**  | 2 Hours     | 
| **Negative Marking**| Yes (0.50 marks deducted) | 
| **Selection Process**| Written Exam + Computer Skills Test | 
| **Exam Language**  | English (with possible Odia) |
| **Official Website**| [ssbodisha.ac.in](ssbodisha.ac.in) |

**Exam Pattern:**

| Subject/Section             | No. of Questions | Marks | 
|------------------------------|------------------|-------| 
| General English              | 30               | 60    | 
| General Knowledge & Current Affairs | 20               | 40    | 
| General Mathematics          | 20               | 40    | 
| Reasoning & Mental Ability   | 30               | 60    | 
| **Total**                    | **100**          | **200**| 

**Syllabus Breakdown:**

1.  **General English:** Tense, Voice, Subject–Verb Agreement, Articles, Prepositions, Synonyms & Antonyms, Sentence Correction, Comprehension Passage, Vocabulary, Grammar and Usage.
2.  **General Knowledge & Current Affairs:** Indian History, Important Dates and Personalities, Geography (Odisha/India), Countries and Capitals, Books and Authors, Scientific Discoveries, National & International Current Affairs (last 6-12 months), Static GK.
3.  **General Mathematics:** Number System, Fractions and Decimals, HCF & LCM, Percentage, Average, Profit and Loss, Simple and Compound Interest, Ratio and Proportion, Time and Work, Time and Distance, Statistics.
4.  **Reasoning & Mental Ability:** Numerical Ability, Logical Reasoning, Analytical Thinking, Problem Solving, Decision Making, Series Completion, Analogies, Coding-Decoding, Blood Relations, Direction Sense, Puzzles.

**Preparation Tips:**

*   Understand the syllabus and exam pattern.
*   Create a realistic study timetable.
*   Practice previous year question papers.
*   Take regular mock tests.

website_content.title: RTE MP Admission 2026-27
website_content.markdown_content:
## RTE MP Admission 2026-27 – Apply Online for Nursery, KG, Class 1 (EWS/DG)

RTE MP Admission 2026-27 is now open for Nursery, KG (LKG/UKG), and Class 1 under the Right to Education (RTE) Act 2009, reserving 25% of seats in private unaided schools across Madhya Pradesh for children from Economically Weaker Sections (EWS) and Disadvantaged Groups (DG).

**Key Details:**

| Item | Detail |
|---|---| 
| Full scheme name | Right to Education (RTE) Admission MP 2026-27 |
| Classes covered | Nursery, KG (LKG/UKG), Class 1 |
| Mode of admission | 100% online, lottery-based |
| Application start date | 13 March 2026 |
| Application last date | 28 March 2026 |
| Document verification | 14–30 March 2026 (Jan Shiksha Kendra / cluster centres) |
| Online lottery date | 2 April 2026 |
| Target groups | Economically Weaker Sections (EWS) and Disadvantaged Groups (DG) |

**Eligibility:**

*   **EWS:** Families with low income (typically below ₹1.5–2.5 lakh per year) with proof like BPL/Antyodaya ration card or EWS/income certificate.
*   **DG:** Includes children from SC, ST, OBC, Vimukta Jatis, families with forest rights, children with 40%+ disability, HIV-affected children, and orphans.

**Age Limit (as of 2026):**

*   Nursery/KG: 3-6 years (depending on sub-category)
*   Class 1: 6-7.5 years

**Documents Required:**

*   Child’s Aadhaar & Samagra ID
*   Birth Certificate
*   EWS/Income Proof
*   Caste Certificate (if applicable)
*   Residence Proof

**Application Process:**

1.  Visit the official website.
2.  Download and read the official notification.
3.  Check school and seat availability.
4.  Register and fill the application form.
5.  Upload documents and submit.
6.  Track application status and attend document verification.
7.  Await the lottery result.

**Important Note:** Seats are filled *only* by lottery. Priority is given to children from the same/adjoining villages/wards.

website_content.title: Federal Bank Apprentice Recruitment 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## Federal Bank Apprentice Recruitment 2026

Federal Bank is seeking eligible graduates for a one-year apprenticeship program across Kerala, Tamil Nadu, and Karnataka under the Apprenticeship (Amendment) Act 1973.

**Key Details:**

*   **Post Name:** Graduate Apprentice
*   **Eligibility:** Full-time graduation with at least 50% marks.
*   **Stipend:** Rs. 18,000/- per month (all inclusive)
*   **Age Limit:** Maximum 28 years as of 01 March 2026 (born on or after 01 March 1998).
*   **Training Period:** 1 Year
*   **Application Mode:** Online through NATS Portal
*   **Application Dates:** 10 March - 17 March 2026
*   **Selection Process:** Application Shortlisting & Personal Interview

**Important Notes:**

*   No application fee.
*   Candidates should not have undergone apprenticeship training elsewhere.

website_content.title: TN 12th Economics Exam 2026 - Details & Resources
website_content.markdown_content:
## Tamil Nadu 12th Economics Exam 2026 - Important Information

The Tamil Nadu 12th Economics Public Exam for the 2026 academic year is scheduled for **March 13, 2026**, from **10:00 AM to 1:15 PM**. This exam is part of the overall TN 12th public exams running from **March 2, 2026, to March 26, 2026**.

**Key Details:**

*   **Board:** Directorate of Government Examinations, Tamil Nadu (DGE TN)
*   **Class:** Higher Secondary Second Year (+2) / Class 12
*   **Subject:** Part III – Economics (Commerce stream)
*   **Total Marks:** 100 (Theory + Internal Assessment)
*   **Exam Duration:** 3 hours writing + 15 minutes reading time
*   **Mode:** Offline, Pen-and-Paper

**Exam Pattern:**

*   **Part I:** Objective/MCQ (1 mark each)
*   **Part II:** Very Short Answer (2 marks each)
*   **Part III:** Short Answer (3 marks each, internal choice)
*   **Part IV:** Long/Essay Type (5 marks each, diagrams & explanations)

**Resources Available Soon After the Exam:**

*   **Unofficial Answer Key 2026:** Section-wise, set-wise key with correct options and key points.
*   **Question Paper PDF 2026:** Complete paper with all parts for practice.

**Important Note:** The answer key provided is unofficial and for self-evaluation only. Official results will be released by DGE Tamil Nadu.

website_content.title: ICSE Class 10 Biology Exam 2026 - Details & Answer Key
website_content.markdown_content:
## ICSE Class 10 Biology (Science Paper 3) - 2026 Exam Information

The ICSE Class 10 Biology exam (Science Paper 3) is scheduled for **Friday, March 13, 2026**, from **11:00 AM to 1:00 PM**. This is a **2-hour** offline, pen-and-paper exam conducted by the **Council for the Indian School Certificate Examinations (CISCE)**.

**Exam Highlights:**

*   **Exam Board:** CISCE
*   **Class:** ICSE Class 10
*   **Subject:** Biology - Science Paper 3
*   **Exam Date:** Friday, March 13, 2026
*   **Exam Time:** 11:00 AM to 1:00 PM
*   **Exam Duration:** 2 hours
*   **Mode:** Offline, Written

**Question Paper Pattern:**

The paper will assess conceptual clarity, diagram skills, and application-based understanding. It typically includes:

*   **Section I:** Short-answer questions (entire syllabus)
*   **Section II:** Long-answer and structured questions (with internal choices)

**Key Units:**

*   Cell division and genetics
*   Plant physiology (photosynthesis, transpiration, respiration)
*   Human anatomy and physiology (circulatory, respiratory, nervous, excretory systems)
*   Health, hygiene and disease
*   Environment, ecosystems and pollution
*   Basic principles of biotechnology and waste management

**Unofficial Answer Key (Available after the exam):**

An unofficial ICSE Biology answer key will be available after the exam concludes at 1:00 PM on March 13, 2026. It will include:

*   Question-wise answers
*   Correct options/points for short answers
*   Key headings for long answers and diagrams
*   Downloadable PDF format

**Exam Day Tips:**

*   Arrive 30-40 minutes early.
*   Read the entire paper during reading time.
*   Start with easy questions.
*   Draw neat, labelled diagrams.
*   Revise in the last 10-15 minutes.

## NEET UG 2026 Correction Window

The correction window for NEET UG 2026 is open from **March 12–14, 2026 (12:00 PM to 11:50 PM)**. Registered candidates can correct errors in their application details.

**Key Details:**

*   **Correction Dates:** March 12–14, 2026 (12:00 PM to 11:50 PM)
*   **Official Portal:** [Click Here](https://neet.nta.nic.in)
*   **Editable Fields:** Name, DOB, category, gender, photo/signature (limited)
*   **Non-Editable Fields:** Email, mobile, Aadhaar
*   **Fee:** None for most candidates.
*   **Exam Date:** May 3, 2026 (expected)

**Eligibility:** Open to candidates who completed registration and fee payment by March 11, 2026.

**How to Access:**

1.  Visit [Click Here](https://neet.nta.nic.in).
2.  Click on the "Correction Window" during active hours.
3.  Login with your application number and password/DOB.

**Important Tip:** Ensure the correct photo and signature are uploaded if editing. No extensions are expected.

## GPAT 2026 Provisional Answer Key Released!

NBEMS has released the Provisional Answer Key for GPAT 2026 on **March 12, 2026**. Candidates can now access their response sheets and question papers.

**Key Details:**

*   **Release Date:** March 12, 2026
*   **Official Portal:** natboard.edu.in
*   **Objection Window:** Typically 3-4 days post-release (check site for exact dates)
*   **Access Requirements:** Application ID, Date of Birth, Security Pin
*   **Score Formula:** +4 for correct, -1 for incorrect
*   **Final Result:** Expected by April 7, 2026

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit natboard.edu.in.
2.  Click the application/login link for GPAT 2026.
3.  Enter Application ID, DOB, and security pin.
4.  Download Response Sheet, Answer Key, and Question Paper (PDFs).

**Objection Process:**

*   Log in at natboard.edu.in.
*   Select "Challenge Answer Key".
*   Pick questions and upload supporting documents (fee applies: ₹100-200 per question).
*   Submit and pay online.

**Important Notes:**

*   Act fast during peak traffic.
*   Objections require supporting evidence.
*   Final key changes depend on valid evidence.
*   Results are based on normalized scores.

website_content.title: BFUHS Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## BFUHS Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026

**Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS)** has announced a recruitment drive for **672 Staff Nurse** positions under the Department of Health and Family Welfare, Punjab.

**Key Details:**

*   **Advertisement Number:** Advt. No. BFU-26/06
*   **Total Vacancies:** 672
*   **Application Period:** 13 March 2026 – 02 April 2026
*   **Application Mode:** Online
*   **Job Location:** Various health institutions under Govt. of Punjab

**Eligibility Criteria:**

*   **Educational Qualification:** 10+2 with Diploma in GNM or B.Sc Nursing from a recognized institution. Must be registered with Punjab Nurses Registration Council (PNRC).
*   **Age Limit:** 18-37 years (as of 01 January 2026). Age relaxation applicable for SC/BC (up to 5 years), PwD (up to 10 years), Widows/Divorcees (up to 40 years), Punjab & Central Govt employees (up to 45 years), and Ex-servicemen (as per rules).
*   **Application Fee:** Rs. 2,360/- for all categories except SC (Rs. 1,180/-).

**Salary:** Rs. 29,200 - Rs. 92,300/- 

**Selection Process:** Written Examination (90 marks) + Experience (10 marks).

**Important Dates:**

*   **Online Application Start:** 13 March 2026
*   **Last Date to Apply:** 02 April 2026

website_content.title: JEE Main 2026 Session 2 Registration Reopened
website_content.markdown_content:
## JEE Main 2026 Session 2 Registration Reopened

The National Testing Agency (NTA) has reopened the registration window for JEE Main 2026 Session 2.

**Key Details:**

*   **Exam Name:** JEE Main 2026 Session 2
*   **Conducting Body:** National Testing Agency (NTA)
*   **Registration Status:** Reopened (as of March 12, 2026)
*   **Mode:** Computer-Based Test (CBT)
*   **Sessions:** Paper 1 (B.E./B.Tech), Paper 2A (B.Arch), Paper 2B (B.Planning)
*   **Purpose:** Admissions to NITs, IIITs, GFTIs; qualifier for JEE Advanced

**Eligibility Criteria:**

*   Passed Class 12 (or equivalent) in 2024, 2025, or appearing in 2026.
*   No age limit, but born on/after October 1, 2001 (5-year relaxation for SC/ST/PwD).
*   Maximum 3 attempts across consecutive years.
*   For B.Arch/B.Planning: Passed Physics, Chemistry, Math in Class 12; 50% aggregate (40% for reserved).

**Application Fees (per session):**

| Category        | Paper 1 (Boys) | Paper 1 (Girls/Reserved) | Paper 2A/2B |
|-----------------|----------------|--------------------------|-------------|
| General         | ₹1000          | ₹800                     | ₹2000       |
| SC/ST/PwD/Transgender | ₹500           | ₹500                     | ₹1000       |

**Important Dates:**

*   **Reopened Registration:** March 12, 2026 onwards
*   **Last Date to Apply:** Check PDF (TBD)
*   **Fee Payment Last Date:** Same as apply deadline
*   **Admit Card Release:** April 2026 (tentative)
*   **Exam Dates:** April-May 2026 (tentative)

website_content.title: Indian Navy SSR (Med) Recruitment 2027
website_content.markdown_content:
## Indian Navy SSR (Med) Recruitment 2027

The Indian Navy invites applications from unmarried male candidates for enrolment as Sailors in the Medical Branch (SSR (Med) 02/2027 batch).

**Eligibility:**
*   10+2 with Physics, Chemistry, and Biology (PCB) with 50% aggregate and minimum 40% in each subject.
*   Born between 01 May 2005 and 31 Oct 2009.
*   Unmarried male candidates.

**Important Dates:**
*   Application Start: 14 March 2026
*   Application Last Date: 06 April 2026
*   Correction Window: 10-11 April 2026
*   INET 2026 Exam: May 2026 (Tentative)
*   INET 2026 Result: May-June 2026 (Tentative)

**Selection Process:**
*   Stage I: INET 2026
*   Stage II: SSR (Med) 02/2027, Medical & Document Verification

**Application Fee:** ₹550 + 18% GST

**Stipend & Salary:**
*   Training: ₹14,600/- per month
*   Post-Training: ₹21,700-₹69,100 + MSP @ ₹5200 + DA

website_content.title: TN 12th Physics Exam Answer Key & Paper - 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## Tamil Nadu 12th Physics Exam 2026 - Unofficial Answer Key & Question Paper

Get access to the unofficial answer key and question paper PDF for the Tamil Nadu 12th Physics Public Exam held on March 13, 2026. This resource will help you estimate your marks and analyze your performance before the official evaluation.

**Exam Highlights:**

*   **Exam Date:** March 13, 2026 (Friday)
*   **Exam Timing:** 10:00 AM to 1:15 PM (3 hours writing + 15 minutes reading time)
*   **Board:** Directorate of Government Examinations, Tamil Nadu (TN DGE)
*   **Class & Subject:** Class 12 (HSC +2) – Physics
*   **Total Marks:** 100 marks (theory + practical)
*   **Exam Schedule:** March 2 to March 26, 2026

**Question Paper Pattern (Theory - 70 Marks):**

*   **Part I:** Objective / MCQs (15 questions, 1 mark each)
*   **Part II:** Very Short Answer (Around 9 questions, answer any 6, 2 marks each)
*   **Part III:** Short Answer (Around 9 questions, answer any 6, 3 marks each)
*   **Part IV:** Long / Essay Answer (5 questions, 5 marks each)

**Availability:**

*   **Answer Key:** Set-wise (A, B, C, etc.) PDF format.
*   **Question Paper:** Complete PDF with section-wise questions.

**Important Note:** This is an *unofficial* answer key. Refer to the official DGE Tamil Nadu results for final marks.

**How to Use:**

1.  Download the Answer Key and Question Paper PDFs.
2.  Attempt the paper again and match your answers.
3.  Calculate your probable score.
4.  Analyze your weak areas.

website_content.title: IIT Madras M.Tech & M.A. Admissions 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## IIT Madras M.Tech & M.A. Admissions 2026 - Complete Guide

**Application Dates:**
*   Application Opens: March 28, 2026 (Saturday)
*   Application Closes: April 27, 2026 (Monday) - tentative
*   Reporting Date: July 20, 2026 (Monday) - tentative
*   Orientation: July 22, 2026 (Wednesday) - tentative
*   Classes Start: July 27, 2026 (Monday) - tentative

**Eligibility:**
*   GATE 2024/2025/2026 or IIT B.Tech CGPA 8.0+
*   Bachelor's in Engineering/Technology/Architecture or Master's in relevant sciences from AICTE/UGC-approved institutions.
*   M.A. requires GATE XH paper qualification.

**Fees:**
*   SC/ST/PwD/Female: ₹300
*   Others: ₹600

**Available Programs:**
*   **M.Tech:** Aerospace Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science & Engineering, Data Science & AI, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Ocean Engineering, and more.
*   **M.A.:** Development Studies, English Studies, Economics, Public Policy (25 seats each).

**How to Apply:**
1.  Register on the COAP portal.
2.  Visit the application portal and select the appropriate category.
3.  Fill the form, choose programs, and upload documents.
4.  Pay the fee online and submit.
5.  Check status and rectify defects if notified.

**Important Documents:**
*   Passport photo
*   Signature
*   GATE scorecard
*   Nationality proof
*   All marksheets
*   Category certificates (SC/ST, OBC-NCL, EWS, PwD)

**Financial Assistance:**
*   HTTA: ₹12,400/month for 22 months.

website_content.title: APSSB Driver, Constable & More Posts - Relaxation List 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## APSSB One-Time Age Relaxation List 2026 Released!

The Arunachal Pradesh Staff Selection Board (APSSB) has released a special One-Time Relaxation Candidates List on **13th March 2026** for recruitment to Constable, Fireman, and related uniformed services posts.

**Key Details:**

*   **Recruiting Body:** Arunachal Pradesh Staff Selection Board
*   **Post Name:** Driver, Constable (IRBn, Civil Police, Band, Bugler), Fireman, Special Tiger Guard & More
*   **Result Type:** One-Time Age Relaxation Candidates List
*   **Release Date:** 13th March 2026
*   **Related Previous Exam:** Written Exam on 13.07.2025 (Advt 09/2020)
*   **Selection Stages:** Written Test → PST/PET → Driving Test (where applicable) → Document Verification
*   **Official Website:** apssb.nic.in

This list provides one-time upper age relaxation for eligible candidates who appeared in the written exam held on 13.07.2025.

**How to Check:**

1.  Visit the official website: apssb.nic.in
2.  Go to the Notices / Latest Announcements section.
3.  Look for the notice dated 13.03.2026.
4.  Click on the PDF link for Annexure-1.
5.  Search using your Roll Number or Name.

**Important Instructions:**

*   Download and save the list PDF.
*   Verify your details carefully.
*   Apply online for Advt 04/2026 if eligible.
*   This is a one-time relaxation measure only.

website_content.title: NCET 2026 Correction Window Open
website_content.markdown_content:
## NCET 2026 Application Correction Details

The National Testing Agency (NTA) has opened a correction window for the NCET 2026 application form from **March 12 to March 14, 2026 (up to 11:50 PM)**.

**Key Details:**

*   **Correction Window:** March 12 – 14, 2026 (till 11:50 PM)
*   **Official Portal:** [Click Here](https://exams.nta.nic.in/NCET/)
*   **Notice PDF:** [Click Here](Link to PDF - not provided in text)

**Editable Fields:**

*   Candidate name
*   Parents' names
*   Class 10/12 details
*   Date of Birth (DOB)
*   Exam center
*   Subjects/University/Programme

**Non-Editable Fields:**

*   Core registration details (refer to the official PDF for a complete list).

**Fees:**

*   Changes may require a fee payment, payable online.

**Eligibility:**

*   Registered NCET 2026 candidates with confirmed applications (fee paid by March 11).

**How to Edit:**

1.  Visit the NTA NCET homepage.
2.  Click on "NCET 2026 Application Form Correction" in the candidate activity section.
3.  Log in using your application number and password/DOB.
4.  Select "Edit Application Form".
5.  Update details, pay any required fee, and submit.
6.  Download the revised confirmation page.

**Important Notes:**

*   Review your form carefully before submitting.
*   Changes are final after submission.
*   The portal may experience high traffic on March 14 – apply early.

website_content.markdown_content:
## Ordnance Factory Bhandara DBW Recruitment 2026

**Organization:** Ordnance Factory Bhandara, Munitions India Limited

**Post Name:** Tenure Based Danger Building Worker (DBW) – Skilled

**Total Vacancies:** 400 Posts

**Job Location:** Ordnance Factory Bhandara, Bhandara, Maharashtra

**Engagement Type:** Tenure based contractual engagement (up to 4 years)

**Application Mode:** Offline (by post)

**Pay Scale:** Rs. 19,900/- plus applicable DA and other admissible allowances

**Qualification Required:** NAC from NCVT in AOCP or approved feeder trades (Chemical, Mechanical, Electrical and allied trades)

**Age Limit:** 18 to 40 years as on 28 March 2026, with applicable age relaxations (SC/ST: 05 Years, OBC: 03 Years, Ex-Serviceman: Period of Military Service + 03 Years)

**Selection Process:** Merit based on NAC marks and Trade Test/Practical Test (80% NAC, 20% Trade Test), followed by document verification and medical fitness

**Last Date to Apply:** 28 March 2026

**Application Fee:** NIL

**Important Dates:**
* Notification Release Date: March 2026
* Application Start Date: Already Started
* Last Date to Submit Application Form: 28 March 2026

**How to Apply:** Download the application form, fill it, attach required documents, and send it via Speed Post/Registered Post to the address mentioned in the notification.

website_content.title: IAF Agniveervayu (Sports) Recruitment 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## IAF Agniveervayu (Sports) Recruitment 2026

The Indian Air Force (IAF) is seeking outstanding unmarried Indian male sportspersons for recruitment trials as Agniveervayu (Sports) under the Agnipath Scheme.

**Key Details:**

*   **Scheme:** Agnipath Scheme – Agniveervayu (Sports)
*   **Post Name:** Agniveervayu (Sports)
*   **Eligibility:** 10+2, Diploma, or Vocational qualification with prescribed sports achievements.
*   **Age Limit:** 17-21 years (Born between 02 July 2005 and 02 January 2009)
*   **Application Mode:** Online only
*   **Application Fee:** ₹100 + taxes
*   **Important Dates:**
    *   Online Application Start: 23 March 2026 (1000 Hrs)
    *   Online Application Last: 29 March 2026 (1700 Hrs)
    *   Recruitment Trials: 08 - 10 April 2026 (New Delhi)
*   **Selection Process:** Physical Fitness Test, Sports Skill Trials, and Medical Examination
*   **Engagement Period:** 4 years
*   **Job Location:** All India

**Educational Qualification:**

*   10+2 with Science subjects (Maths, Physics, English) with 50% aggregate.
*   3 years Diploma in Engineering with 50% aggregate.
*   2 years Vocational Course with Physics, Maths, and 50% aggregate.
*   10+2 in any stream with 50% aggregate.

**Sports Achievements:**

*   Represented India in International competitions.
*   Minimum 5th place in Junior/Senior Nationals.
*   Represented State/UT in National/All India Inter University.

**Medical Standards:**

*   Height: 152 cm
*   Chest: 77 cm with 5 cm expansion
*   Visual Standard: 6/12 correctable to 6/6

website_content.markdown_content:
## UPPSC LT Grade Assistant Teacher Result 2026 OUT! 

The Uttar Pradesh Public Service Commission (UPPSC) has released the prelims result for Assistant Teacher (Trained Graduate - LT Grade) posts in phases starting February 2026, with the latest updates on March 12, 2026.

**Key Details:**

*   **Recruiting Body:** Uttar Pradesh Public Service Commission
*   **Post Name:** Assistant Teacher (LT Grade / Trained Graduate)
*   **Result Type:** Prelims Written Examination Result (Merit List)
*   **Result Declaration Date:** February 05/18/24, 2026 (phased); Latest March 12, 2026 for some subjects
*   **Exam Conducted On:** December 6, 7, 21, 2025 & January 17, 18, 24, 25, 2026 (subject-wise)
*   **Selection Stages:** Prelims → Mains Written Exam → Document Verification
*   **Total Vacancies:** 7466 (approx.)

**How to Check Your Result:**

1.  Visit the official website: uppsc.up.nic.in
2.  Navigate to the "Results" or "Latest Notifications" section.
3.  Find the link for "Assistant Teacher Trained Graduate (M/F) Branch Prelims Result 2025" or Advertisement No. A-5/E-1/2025.
4.  Download the subject-wise merit list PDF.
5.  Search for your roll number (Ctrl+F).

**Merit List Contains:**

*   Roll Number
*   Qualifying Status for Mains
*   Subject-wise shortlisting

**Important Instructions:**

*   Download and save the merit list.
*   Check the official website for Mains exam dates and call letters.
*   Prepare for the Mains examination.

**Exam Timing:** 9:00 AM – 12:00 PM
**Overall Exam Dates:** 26 February 2026 to 18 March 2026
**Board:** Telangana State Board of Intermediate Education (TGBIE / TSBIE)
**Class:** Inter 2nd Year / Class 12
**Subject:** Chemistry Paper II (Second Year)
**Exam Mode:** Offline, pen-and-paper
**Total Marks:** 100 marks (60 theory + 40 practical)
**Passing Marks:** 35 marks (overall)

### Question Paper Pattern

**Section A:** Q1 – Q10 (Very Short Answer - VSA) - 10 questions, 2 marks each, Total 20 marks
**Section B:** Q11 – Q18 (Short Answer - SA) - 8 questions (attempt any 6), 4 marks each, Total 24 marks
**Section C:** Q19 – Q21 (Long / Essay Answer - LA) - 3 questions (attempt any 2), 8 marks each, Total 16 marks

### Key Features

*   Unofficial Answer Key will be available soon after the exam.
*   TS Class 12th Chemistry II Question Paper 2026 PDF will be provided.
*   Includes Section A, B, and C with diagrams and mark distribution.
*   Mock tests available for Railway NTPC, IBPS Clerk, and SSC CHSL.

**Important Chapters:**
* Solid State and Solutions
* Electrochemistry and Chemical Kinetics
* d- and f-Block Elements and Coordination Compounds
* Haloalkanes and Haloarenes
* Alcohols, Phenols, Ethers
* Aldehydes, Ketones, Carboxylic Acids
* Organic compounds containing Nitrogen
* Polymers, Biomolecules and Chemistry in Everyday Life

## DRDO CEPTAM 11 City Intimation Slip 2026 Released!

DRDO has released the City Intimation Slip for the CEPTAM 11 examination. Candidates can check their exam city details via SMS or email.

**Key Details:**

*   **City Slip Status:** Released on March 13, 2026
*   **Exam Date:** March 23, 2026 (Tier 1 CBT)
*   **Admit Card Release:** Expected around March 20-21, 2026 (2-3 days before exam)
*   **Total Vacancies:** 764 (561 STA-B + 203 Technician-A)
*   **Exam Mode:** Computer Based Test (CBT)

**Important Note:** The City Intimation Slip is *not* your admit card. It only provides the exam city.  The admit card, containing the full exam center address, roll number, and photo, will be released separately.

**How to Check:**

1.  Check your registered mobile for an SMS from DRDO/CEPTAM.
2.  Check your registered email (including spam/promotions folders) for an email from ceptam@drdo.in.
3.  Verify the details (Name, Exam City, Date, Shift).

**Selection Process:** Tier-I CBT + Tier-II CBT + Skill/Trade Test + Document Verification + Medical Examination

The High Court of Jharkhand has released the shortlist for Assistant / Clerk posts in Civil Courts on **13 March 2026**. A total of **1594 candidates** have been shortlisted for the Computer Skill Test & Viva-voce based on the written exam held on **21 September 2025**. 

**Key Details:**

*   **Recruiting Body:** High Court of Jharkhand
*   **Post Name:** Assistant / Clerk (Civil Courts)
*   **Result Type:** Written Examination Shortlist
*   **Result Date:** 13 March 2026
*   **Exam Date:** 21 September 2025
*   **Selection Stages:** Written Test → Computer Skill Test & Viva-voce → Final Merit
*   **Official Website:** [jharkhandhighcourt.nic.in](jharkhandhighcourt.nic.in)

1.  Visit the official website: [jharkhandhighcourt.nic.in](jharkhandhighcourt.nic.in)

*   Computer Skill Test
*   Viva-voce (Interview)

Call letters for the Skill Test will be uploaded on the official website soon. Stay tuned for updates!

website_content.title: Bihar ITI CAT 2026 Admission
website_content.markdown_content:
## Bihar ITI CAT 2026 Admission Details

The Bihar Combined Entrance Competitive Examination Board (BCECEB) will conduct the Industrial Training Institute Common Admission Test (ITICAT) – Bihar ITI CAT 2026 for admission to various ITI trades.

**Important Dates:**

*   Application Start: March 16, 2026
*   Last Date of Application: April 14, 2026
*   Last date for fee submission: April 15, 2026
*   Exam Date: Usually held in June

**Eligibility Criteria:**

*   Qualification: 10th pass (minimum 35% marks) for engineering trades, 8th pass for non-engineering trades.
*   Age Limit: Minimum 14 years as of August 1, 2026.
*   Total Seats: 32,828 (across 151 Government ITIs)

**Application Fees:**

*   General / BC / OBC / EBC / EWS: ₹750
*   SC / ST: ₹100
*   PwD / PH: ₹430

**Documents Required:**

*   Passport-size photo
*   Signature
*   Class 8th/10th marksheet & certificate
*   Aadhaar card or government ID
*   Caste/Category certificate (if applicable)
*   Bihar domicile certificate (if applicable)

**How to Apply:**

1.  Online Registration: Visit the admission portal and complete the registration form.
2.  Login & Form Filling: Log in and fill out all required details.
3.  Upload Documents & Pay Fees: Upload documents and pay the application fee online.
4.  Submit & Confirm: Review and submit the application form.

Download the official notification PDF for detailed information on trades, seats, and rules.

website_content.title: SSB Constable Recruitment 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## Sashastra Seema Bal (SSB) Constable Recruitment 2026

**Overview:**

Sashastra Seema Bal (SSB) is recruiting for 827 Group ‘C’ Non-Gazetted (Combatised) & Non-Ministerial Constable posts including Veterinary, Driver, Gardener, Water Carrier, Cobbler, Tailor, Washerman, Barber, Waiter, Carpenter and Nursing Orderly.

**Key Details:**

*   **Organization:** Sashastra Seema Bal (SSB), Ministry of Home Affairs, Government of India
*   **Advertisement No.:** 524/RC/SSB/Combined Advt./CT to SI (Non-GD)/2025
*   **Total Vacancies:** 827
*   **Pay Scale:** Level-3, ₹21,700–69,100 (7th CPC)
*   **Job Location:** Anywhere in India / outside India as per SSB requirement
*   **Application Mode:** Online only
*   **Selection Process:** PET, PST, Written Exam, Trade/Skill Test, Documentation & Medical Examination

**Important Dates:**

*   **Notification Publication:** 21–27 March 2026
*   **Last Date to Apply:** 30 days from the date of publication in Employment News

**Eligibility Criteria:**

*   **Age Limit:** 18–23 years (most Tradesman posts), 18–27 years (Driver, Veterinary, Nursing Orderly)
*   **Education:** 10th/Matriculation with post-wise requirements (e.g., Science for Veterinary, Heavy Vehicle License for Driver, ITI/Diploma for Tradesman, First Aid certificate + experience for Nursing Orderly).

**Vacancies Breakdown:**

*   Constable (Veterinary): 34
*   Constable (Driver) – Male: 553
*   Constable (Gardener): 41
*   Constable (Water Carrier): 5
*   Constable (Cobbler): 25
*   Constable (Tailor): 41
*   Constable (Washerman): 74
*   Constable (Barber): 43
*   Constable (Waiter): 3
*   Constable (Carpenter): 7
*   Constable (Nursing Orderly): 1

**Application Fee:**

*   Rs. 100/- for UR, EWS, and OBC candidates (Non-Refundable)
*   Exempted for SC, ST, Ex-Servicemen, and female candidates.

**Exam Details:**
*   **Exam Name:** Limited Departmental Competitive Examination (LDCE)
*   **Posts:** Assistant Section Officer (ASO)/Assistant Grade, Senior Secretariat Assistant (SSA)/Upper Division Clerk (UDC) Grade, Junior Secretariat Assistant (JSA)/Lower Division Clerk (LDC) Grade
*   **Answer Key Status:** Final Released
*   **Release Date:** March 12, 2026 (06:00 PM)
*   **Last Date to Download:** March 26, 2026 (06:00 PM)

**How to Download:**
1.  Visit the official website: ssc.gov.in
2.  Log in to the candidate portal.
3.  Navigate to the "Answer Key" or "Notice" section.
4.  Click on the link for the relevant grade (ASO, SSA, JSA).
5.  Download and save the PDF(s).

**Important Note:** This is the *final* answer key. No objections will be accepted.

**Scoring:**
Total Score = (Correct Answers × Marks per Question) – (Wrong Answers × Negative Marking)

website_content.title: IOCL Apprentices Recruitment 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## Indian Oil Corporation Limited (IOCL) Apprentices Recruitment 2026

**Overview:**

IOCL has announced 109 vacancies for Trade & Technician Apprentices at Bongaigaon & Guwahati Refineries.

**Key Details:**

*   **Company:** Indian Oil Corporation Limited (IOCL) – Bongaigaon & Guwahati Refineries
*   **Posts:** Trade Apprentice / Technician Apprentice (Attendant Operator, Boiler, Chemical, Mechanical, Instrumentation)
*   **Total Vacancies:** 109 (69 at Bongaigaon + 40 at Guwahati)
*   **Advt Nos.:** BGR/APPR/2026/02 (Bongaigaon) & GR/P/APP/2025-26/4 (Guwahati)
*   **Stipend:** As per Apprentices Act, 1961/1973 and IOCL guidelines
*   **Qualification:** 3 years B.Sc (Maths, Physics, Chemistry or Industrial Chemistry) or 3 years Diploma in relevant Engineering disciplines (50% marks – 45% for SC/ST/PwBD)
*   **Age Limit:** 18-24 years (as on 28.02.2026) - Relaxation applicable for SC/ST/OBC-NCL/PwBD
*   **Last Date:** 22-03-2026 (17:00 Hrs)
*   **Apply Mode:** Online (NAPS/NATS Portal + Microsoft Form)
*   **Job Type:** Apprenticeship Training (12/24 months)

**Important Dates:**

*   Notification Date: 15 March 2026
*   Application Start: 15 March 2026 (10:00 Hrs)
*   Application End: 22 March 2026 (17:00 Hrs)

**Selection Process:** Merit list based on qualifying exam marks, Document Verification, and Medical Fitness.

**Note:** No obligation for employment after apprenticeship. Apply separately for each Refinery.

website_content.title: BSEB 12th Result 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## BSEB 12th Result 2026 - Updates & How to Check

The Bihar School Examination Board (BSEB) is expected to release the Class 12th Result 2026 on its official website: [biharboardonline.com](https://biharboardonline.com).

**Key Highlights:**

*   **Exam Name:** Bihar Board 12th
*   **Course/Class:** Class 12th
*   **Academic Session:** 2026
*   **Result Status:** Expected Soon
*   **Expected Result Date:** Between March 21 and March 24, 2026
*   **Credentials Required:** Roll Number and Registration Number

**How to Check Online:**

1.  Visit the official website: [biharboardonline.com](https://biharboardonline.com).
2.  Click on the 'Results' tab.
3.  Select 'Class 12th Examination Result 2026'.
4.  Enter your Roll Number and Registration Number.
5.  Submit and view your result.
6.  Download the mark sheet (PDF).
7.  Verify all details on the mark sheet.

**Details on Mark Sheet:**

*   Candidate's Name
*   Roll Number & Registration ID
*   Course & Semester Information
*   Subject-wise Marks / Grades
*   Total CGPA or Percentage
*   Result Status (Pass / Fail)
*   University Seal or Verification Code

website_content.markdown_content:
## Andaman & Nicobar Forest Department Recruitment 2026

The Department of Environment & Forests, Andaman & Nicobar Administration, is seeking applications for **348 vacancies** including **296 Mazdoor posts** and **52 Group ‘C’ posts** (Draftsman, Grader, Assistant Sawyer, Beltman, Oiler, Timber Recorder, Tallyman, and Grinder).

**Key Details:**

*   **Company:** Department of Environment & Forests, Andaman & Nicobar Administration
*   **Posts:** Mazdoor & Various Group ‘C’ Posts
*   **Total Vacancies:** 348
*   **Salary:** Pay Level-1 (₹18000-₹56900) + allowances
*   **Qualification:** 10th Pass / Trade specific qualification
*   **Age Limit:**
    *   Male: 18-33 Years
    *   Female: 18-38 Years
*   **Application Fee:** ₹100 (except for Women & ST candidates)
*   **Last Date to Apply:** 29 April 2026 (11:59 PM)
*   **Application Mode:** Online

**Important Dates:**

*   Online Application Start: 16 March 2026 (11:00 AM)
*   Application Fee Payment Last Date: 29 April 2026
*   Application Correction Window: 30 April - 06 May 2026

**Selection Process:**

1.  Physical Endurance Test
2.  Trade Test / Skill Test
3.  Document Verification

**Apply at:** https://erecruitment.andamannicobar.gov.in

website_content.title: Land Records Assistant (LRA) - Assam
website_content.markdown_content:
## DLRS Assam Land Records Assistant Recruitment 2026

The Directorate of Land Records & Surveys, Assam, is recruiting for **552 Land Records Assistant (LRA)** positions under the Assam Land Records Sub-Ordinate Service Rules (Amendment) 2025.

**Key Details:**

*   **Organization:** Directorate of Land Records & Surveys etc., Assam
*   **Post Name:** Land Records Assistant (LRA)
*   **Total Vacancies:** 552
*   **Scale of Pay:** P.B.-2 Rs. 14,000 – 70,000 + Grade Pay Rs. 6,200
*   **Eligibility:** HSLC or equivalent + 6 months RCCC Training from Assam Survey & Settlement Training Centre, Dakhingaon (excluding Sixth Schedule districts). Computer proficiency and Assamese/Bengali typing skills (30 wpm Unicode) are required.
*   **Age Limit:** 21-40 years (as of 01.01.2025) - relaxation as per Assam Govt. rules.
*   **Selection Process:** Written Examination (80 marks - Maths, Conventional & Modern Survey) + Skill Test (20 marks - Computer Proficiency).
*   **Application Mode:** Online only through SEBA portal.

**Important Dates:**

*   **Advertisement Issue Date:** 15 March 2026
*   **Online Application Start:** 15 March 2026 (11:00 AM)
*   **Last Date to Apply:** 30 April 2026 (05:00 PM)

Total Score = (Correct Answers × Marks per Question) – (Wrong Answers × Negative Marking)

website_content.title: TANCET 2026 Registration
website_content.markdown_content:
## TANCET 2026 Registration Details

TANCET 2026 registration is open from **March 16, 2026** to **April 10, 2026**. 

**Key Details:**

*   **Programs:** MBA, MCA, M.E., M.Tech, M.Arch, M.Plan
*   **Exam Date (MBA/MCA):** May 9, 2026
*   **Application Fee:**
    *   General: ₹1000
    *   Reserved Categories: ₹500
*   **Eligibility:** Bachelor's degree with 50% aggregate (45% for reserved categories) for MBA/MCA. Relevant engineering degree for M.E./M.Tech.

**Important Dates:**

*   Notification Release: March 11, 2026
*   Registration Start: March 16, 2026
*   Registration End: April 10, 2026
*   Admit Card Release: April 2026 (tentative)

**Documents Required:**

*   Passport-size photo
*   Signature
*   SSLC/HSC marksheet
*   Community certificate (if applicable)
*   Nativity certificate (for non-Tamil Nadu candidates)

**Registration Steps:**

1.  Online Registration: Visit the portal, select 'New Registration', and fill in details.
2.  Login and Form Filling: Log in and complete the application form.
3.  Upload Documents & Pay Fees: Upload required documents and pay the fee.
4.  Select Exam Centers: Choose preferred test centers and submit the form.

website_content.title: PSTET 2026 Answer Key Released
website_content.markdown_content:
## PSTET Answer Key 2026 Released!

The Punjab State Council of Educational Research and Training (SCERT Punjab) has released the Provisional Answer Key for the PSTET 2026 examination held on **15th March 2026**. 

**Key Details:**

*   **Exam Date:** 15 March 2026
*   **Answer Key Release Date:** 16 March 2026
*   **Objection Deadline:** 21 March 2026
*   **Expected Final Answer Key:** 28 March 2026
*   **Expected Result Declaration:** 2 April 2026

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit [pstet2025.org](pstet2025.org)
2.  Navigate to the "Answer Key" or "Candidate Login" section.
3.  Login with your Registration Number and Password/Date of Birth.
4.  Download the PDF.

**Objection Process:**

*   Log in to your candidate portal.
*   Go to the "Challenge/Objection" section.
*   Select the question(s) to challenge.
*   Upload supporting documents (if any).
*   Submit before **21st March 2026**.

**Qualifying Marks (Expected):**

*   General (UR)/EWS: 60% (90/150)
*   OBC/SC/ST: 55% (82/150)

**Note:** No negative marking in the exam.

website_content.title: Beed District Police Patil Result 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## Beed District Police Patil Result 2026 OUT! 

The Beed District Administration (Government of Maharashtra) has released the Provisional Selection List for Police Patil posts on **15th March 2026**. This applies to the Patoda Sub-Division.

**Key Details:**

*   **Recruiting Body:** Beed District Administration, Government of Maharashtra
*   **Post Name:** Police Patil
*   **Result Type:** Provisional Selection List (After Written Exam & Interview)
*   **Declaration Date:** 15th March 2026
*   **Exam Date:** 22nd February 2026
*   **Selection Stages:** Written Test → Document Verification → Interview → Provisional Selection
*   **Official Website:** [beed.gov.in](beed.gov.in)

**How to Check:**

1.  Visit [beed.gov.in](beed.gov.in)
2.  Navigate to the "Recruitment" or "What's New" section.
3.  Find "Police Patil Recruitment – 2026" notices (Sub-Division wise).
4.  Click the relevant Provisional Selection List link (e.g., Patoda Sub-Division).
5.  Download the PDF and search for your details.

The list contains Application Number/Roll Number, Candidate Name, Father's Name, Category, Total Marks/Merit Position, and Selection Status.  Remember to check for updates and further instructions on the official website.

**Important:** Download, save, and print the list for your reference. Verify your details and report any discrepancies.

*   **Number of Vacancies:** 4441
*   **Eligibility:** 10th/12th pass and Graduates
*   **Application Fee:** No Fee

*   **Exam Duration:** 1 hour 45 minutes
*   **Qualifying Marks:**
    *   General: 50%

*   **Age Limit:** 18-42 years (Relaxation as per rules)

**Important Dates:**
* Notification Release Date: 06 February 2026
* Opening Date to Apply Online: 09 February 2026
* Last Date to Apply Online: 23 February 2026 (11:59 PM)
* Reopen Application Start Date: 16 March 2026
* Reopen Application Last Date: 19 March 2026

For detailed information, refer to the official notification.

website_content.title: GATE 2026 Final Answer Key Released
website_content.markdown_content:
## GATE 2026 Final Answer Key Released!

The final answer key for GATE 2026 has been released by IIT Guwahati on **March 16, 2026**, following a review of objections. Candidates can now download it from the GOAPS portal.

**Key Details:**

*   **Released By:** IIT Guwahati
*   **Release Date:** March 16, 2026
*   **Provisional Key Date:** February 22, 2026
*   **Objection Window:** February 25-28, 2026
*   **Exam Dates:** February 7, 8, 14, 15, 2026
*   **Papers Covered:** 30 papers (AE, AG, AR, BM, BT, CE, CH, CS, etc.)
*   **Results Date:** March 19, 2026

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit the [GOAPS portal](Click Here).
2.  Enter your Enrollment ID and Password.
3.  Login and select the relevant paper/session.
4.  Download the Final Answer Key PDF and your Response Sheet.

**Score Calculation:**

Raw Score = (MCQ marks) + (MSQ/Numerical marks) - Penalties (-1/3 for 1-mark MCQs, -2/3 for 2-mark MCQs).

**Important Links:**

*   GOAPS Login: [Click Here]
*   GATE 2026 Official Site: [Click Here]

Results will be declared on March 19, 2026. Prepare for M.Tech admissions (CCMT/COAP) and PSU recruitments (e.g., BHEL).

website_content.title: DSSSB Various Posts Answer Key 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## DSSSB Various Posts Answer Key 2026 Released!

The Delhi Subordinate Services Selection Board (DSSSB) has released the provisional answer key for various posts. Candidates who appeared in the examinations held from **February 16, 2026 to May 14, 2026** can now download it.

**Key Details:**

*   **Organization:** Delhi Subordinate Services Selection Board (DSSSB)
*   **Posts:** Various (Jr Engineer, Caretaker, Naib Tehsildar, TGT, Music Teacher, etc.)
*   **Exam Dates:** February 16, 2026 - May 14, 2026
*   **Answer Key Status:** Released (Provisional, post-wise)
*   **Objection Fee:** ₹100 per question (refundable if accepted)

**Important Dates:**

*   **Answer Key Released:** From February 20, 2026 (post-wise)
*   **Objection Deadline:** Post-wise (check official notice)
*   **Final Answer Key (Expected):** March-May 2026 onwards
*   **Result Declaration (Expected):** Soon after final key

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit [dsssb.delhi.gov.in](dsssb.delhi.gov.in)
2.  Navigate to the "Answer Keys" or "DoIT Universal Content" section.
3.  Click on the relevant "Display of Draft Answer Keys" link.
4.  Login with your Application Number and Password/Date of Birth.
5.  Download the PDF.

**How to Raise Objection:**

1.  Login to your candidate portal on [dsssb.delhi.gov.in](dsssb.delhi.gov.in).
2.  Go to the "Challenge/Objection" section.
3.  Select the question(s) to challenge.
4.  Upload supporting documents (if required).
5.  Pay the objection fee.
6.  Submit before the deadline.

**Marking Scheme:**

*   Correct Answer: +1 mark
*   Wrong Answer: -0.25 mark
*   Unattempted: 0 marks

**Notification Date:** 16 March 2026

**Total Vacancies:** 86

**Posts:** Tenure-Based DBW, Project Engineer

**Age Limit:** 18-40 years (DBW), 18-30 years (Project Engineer). Age relaxation applies for OBC(NCL), SC/ST, and Ex-Servicemen.

**Last Date:** 21 days from the date of publication in Employment News.

**Apply Mode:** Offline

**Selection Process:** Document Verification (80-85%), Personal Interaction/Interview (15%), Trade Test/Practical Test (20%).

*   **Trade Apprentice:** 237 vacancies (ITI certificate in relevant trade)
*   **Technician Apprentice:** 33 vacancies (3-year Diploma in relevant engineering stream)
*   **Graduate Apprentice:** 67 vacancies (Graduation in relevant engineering/general stream)

**Eligibility Criteria:**
*   **Age (as of 06/04/2026):**
    *   Trade Apprentice: 18-24 years
    *   Technician Apprentice: 18-25 years
    *   Graduate Apprentice: 18-26 years
*   **Age Relaxation:** SC/ST (5 years), OBC (NCL) (3 years), PwBD (General & EWS) (10 years), PwBD (SC/ST) (15 years), PwBD (OBC NCL) (13 years).
*   **Nationality:** Indian National
*   **Educational Qualification:** As specified above for each apprentice type.

**Stipend:**
*   Trade Apprentice: ₹10,560–₹11,040 per month
*   Technician Apprentice: ₹10,900 per month
*   Graduate Apprentice: ₹12,300 per month

**Important Dates:**
*   Advertisement Release Date: 17 March 2026
*   Last Date to Submit Application: 06 April 2026

**Application Mode:** Offline by Post

**Selection Process:** Merit-based on ITI/Diploma/Graduation marks + Preference to nearby villages (within 16 km radius).

**Note:** Candidates must be registered on NAPS 2.0 / NATS 2.0 portal.

website_content.title: IBPS Deputy Manager Recruitment 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## IBPS Deputy Manager Call Letter 2026 OUT!

The Institute of Banking Personnel Selection (IBPS) has released the call letter for the Deputy Manager - AI Application Developer recruitment on **17 March 2026**. Candidates can download their admit cards from the official website.

**Key Details:**

*   **Release Date:** 17 March 2026
*   **Exam Date:** March/April 2026
*   **Total Vacancies:** 1 (Deputy Manager - AI Application Developer)
*   **Advertisement No.:** IBPS/2025-26/06

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit the official IBPS website: ibps.in
2.  Navigate to the "Careers" or "CRP" section.
3.  Click on the link for "Download Call Letter for Online Examination – Deputy Manager (AI Application Developer) Advt. No. IBPS/2025-26/06".
4.  Enter your Registration No./Roll No. and Password/Date of Birth.
5.  Download and print the call letter (2-3 copies recommended).

**Important Documents to Carry:**

*   IBPS Deputy Manager Call Letter 2026 (printed copy)
*   Valid Photo ID Proof (Aadhaar, PAN, Passport, Driving License, Voter ID)
*   Recent passport-size photographs (2 copies)

**Important Instructions:**

*   Reach the exam center 45-60 minutes before reporting time.
*   Entry closes 30 minutes before the exam.
*   Prohibited items include mobile phones, smartwatches, calculators, books, and bags.

**If you face issues downloading the call letter:**

*   Clear browser cache and cookies.
*   Try a different browser.
*   Verify your application status.
*   Contact IBPS helpdesk immediately.

website_content.title: ISRO VSSC Medical Officer & Dermatologist Recruitment 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## ISRO VSSC Recruitment 2026 - Medical Professionals Wanted!

Vikram Sarabhai Space Centre (VSSC) under ISRO is seeking applications for contract-based positions:

*   **Authorised Medical Officer (Allopathy)** - Parassala, Thiruvananthapuram
*   **Authorised Medical Officer (Homeopathy)** - Nemom, Thiruvananthapuram
*   **Dermatologist** - Thiruvananthapuram City

**Eligibility:**

*   **AMO (Allopathy):** MBBS with permanent Medical Council Registration, 2+ years experience, consultation room at Parassala.
*   **AMO (Homeopathy):** BHMS with Registration in Council of Indian Systems of Medicine, 2+ years experience, consultation room at Nemom.
*   **Dermatologist:** MBBS + MD/DNB Dermatology OR PG Diploma in Dermatology with registration, 2+ years experience, consultation room in Thiruvananthapuram.

**Salary:**

*   AMO (Allopathy): ₹12,000 - ₹54,000/month (based on files)
*   AMO (Homeopathy): ₹12,500/month (fixed)
*   Dermatologist: ₹400/consultation

**Important Dates:**

*   Advertisement Date: 17-03-2026
*   Last Date to Apply: 31-03-2026

**Age Preference:** Doctors below 70 years.

**Contract Duration:** Initially 6 months (extendable).

**Apply via email to:** chsshelp@vssc.gov.in

website_content.title: Kerala Plus Two Maths Answer Key 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## Kerala Plus Two Maths Answer Key 2026

The Directorate of Higher Secondary Education (DHSE) Kerala conducted the Plus Two Mathematics exam on March 17, 2026, from 9:30 AM to 11:45 AM. Approximately 4,52,437 students appeared for the exam at 1,984 centres.

The unofficial answer key is prepared by subject experts and is available shortly after the exam. Students can use it to estimate their score (out of 80 marks for the theory paper).

**Exam Highlights:**

| Particulars | Details |
|---|---| 
| Conducting Board | Directorate of Higher Secondary Education, Kerala (DHSE) |
| Exam Name | Kerala Plus Two Maths 2026 |
| Exam Date | March 17, 2026 |
| Exam Time | 9:30 AM - 11:45 AM |
| Total Marks | 100 (80 Theory + 20 Internal Assessment) |
| Unofficial Answer Key | Available after 11:45 AM (March 17, 2026) |
| Official Answer Key | Released by DHSE Kerala (Tentative - March 2026) |

**Difficulty Level Analysis:**

| Section | Question Type | Difficulty Level |
|---|---|---| 
| Section A | Very Short Answer | Easy |
| Section B | Short Answer | Easy to Moderate |
| Section C | Medium Answer | Moderate |
| Section D | Long Answer | Moderate to Difficult |

**Marks Distribution:**

| Question Numbers | Questions to Attempt | Marks Per Question | Total Marks |
|---|---|---|---| 
| 1 to 8 | 6 out of 8 | 3 | 18 |
| 9 to 18 | 8 out of 10 | 4 | 32 |
| 19 to 25 | 5 out of 7 | 6 | 30 |
| Total |  |  | 80 |

**Note:** A minimum of 30% is required in the theory paper to qualify. The total exam is 100 marks (80 theory + 20 internal assessment).

**How to Download:**

1. Visit the official website of DHSE Kerala or trusted education portals.
2. Search for “Kerala Plus Two Answer Key 2026”.
3. Click on the link for “+2 Maths Answer Key 2026”.
4. Select the Mathematics subject.
5. Download the PDF and compare your answers.

website_content.title: HPCET 2026 Registration
website_content.markdown_content:
## HPCET 2026 Registration – Apply for B.Tech, B.Pharmacy, MBA & More

HPCET 2026 registration is open from **March 13 to April 19, 2026**. The exam will be conducted offline on **May 9-10, 2026**. 

**Key Details:**

*   **Conducting Body:** Himachal Pradesh Technical University (HPTU)
*   **Exam Mode:** Offline (Pen-and-Paper)
*   **Registration Period:** March 13 – April 19, 2026
*   **Exam Dates:** May 9-10, 2026
*   **Courses Offered:** B.Tech, B.Pharmacy, MBA, MCA, MBA (T&HM), B.Sc. (HM & CT)/BHMCT, M.Sc. Physics, M.Sc. Environmental Sciences
*   **Eligibility:** Generally 10+2 with 45% for B.Tech/B.Pharmacy (40% for reserved categories). Refer to the prospectus for detailed course-specific criteria.
*   **Counselling:** July 2026 (tentative)

**Application Process:**

1.  Visit the official website.
2.  Click on "New Registration" and fill in the required details.
3.  Log in, complete the application form, and upload necessary documents.
4.  Pay the application fee online.
5.  Submit and print the form.

**Important Note:** Download the prospectus PDF for detailed information on fees, syllabus, and rules. No extensions to the registration deadline are expected.

**Employment Notice No:** 01/2026
**Post Name:** Syce
**Group:** Group C
**Pay Scale:** Pay Matrix Level-1 (Rs. 18,000 – 56,900) + allowances
**Total Vacancies:** 12
**Job Location:** 61 Cavalry, Jaipur & New Delhi
**Apply Mode:** Offline

**Vacancy Details:**

| Post | No. of Vacancies | Reservation |
|---|---|---|
| Syce | 12 | EWS – 04, OBC – 07, ST – 01 |

**Eligibility Details:**

| Post | Qualification |
|---|---|
| Syce | Matriculation pass or equivalent from a recognized Board. Must be conversant with the duties of Syce. Maintenance and feeding of horses including saddlery equipment and cleaning of stables |

**Age Limit:**
* EWS: 18 to 25 Years (relaxable up to 35 years for Government servants)
* OBC: 18 to 28 Years
* ST: 18 to 30 Years

**Crucial date for age calculation:** Last date of receipt of application

**Selection Process:**
1. Written Examination
2. Medical Examination

| Subject | Questions | Marks |
|---|---|---|

| General Awareness | 25 | 25 |
| Numerical Aptitude | 25 | 25 |
| General English | 25 | 25 |
| Trade Specific | 50 | 50 |

**Important Dates:**
* **Last Date to Apply:** 28-03-2026 (21 days from 07-02-2026)

**How to Apply:**
* Application must be submitted in the prescribed proforma.
* Attach passport-size photograph.
* Enclose self-attested copies of certificates.
* Send application in a sealed envelope with the superscription “Application for the Post of Syce”.
* Incomplete or late applications will be rejected.

website_content.title: Karnataka SSLC Kannada Answer Key 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## Karnataka SSLC Kannada Answer Key 2026 (Unofficial)

The Karnataka School Examination and Assessment Board (KSEAB) conducted the SSLC First Language Kannada exam on **March 18, 2026**, from 10:00 AM to 1:15 PM.

The Karnataka SSLC First Language Kannada paper is for 100 marks (theory) + 25 marks (internal assessment) = **Total 125 marks**.

**Unofficial Answer Key:** Available after 1:15 PM (March 18, 2026).

**Official Answer Key:** To be released by KSEAB in **April 2026** (tentative).

### Exam Highlights:

*   **Conducting Board:** Karnataka School Examination and Assessment Board (KSEAB)
*   **Exam Name:** Karnataka SSLC First Language Kannada 2026
*   **Exam Date:** March 18, 2026
*   **Exam Time:** 10:00 AM – 1:15 PM
*   **Total Marks:** 125 (100 Theory + 25 Internal Assessment)

### Score Calculation (Theory - 100 Marks):

*   **Objective/Very Short:** 15-20 Marks (approx.)
*   **Short/Medium Answer:** 40-50 Marks (approx.)
*   **Long Answer/Essay/Letter:** 20-25 Marks (approx.)

**Qualifying Marks:** Students generally need at least 30% of the total marks (125) to qualify.

### How to Download:

1.  Visit the official KSEAB website or a trusted education portal.
2.  Look for the 'SSLC Answer Key 2026' or 'Karnataka SSLC 2026' link.
3.  Select 'First Language Kannada'.
4.  Download the PDF and match your answers.

website_content.markdown_content:
## HVF Avadi Apprentice Recruitment 2026-27

Heavy Vehicles Factory (HVF), Avadi, Chennai is seeking applications for **450 Apprenticeship** positions for the year 2026-27 under the Apprenticeship (Amendment) Act 1973.

**Key Details:**

*   **Total Vacancies:** 450 (150 Graduate, 50 Diploma, 250 Non-Engineering Graduates)
*   **Disciplines:** Mechanical, Electrical, Electronics, Computer Science, Civil, Automobile, Commerce, BCA, and more (see details below).
*   **Eligibility:** Graduates/Diploma holders who passed out in 2022, 2023, 2024, or 2025 from Tamil Nadu, Kerala, Karnataka, Andhra Pradesh, Telangana, or Puducherry.
*   **Stipend:**
    *   Graduate & Non-Engineering Graduates: ₹18,000/month
    *   Diploma: ₹16,200/month
*   **Application Mode:** Online through NATS portal
*   **Important Dates:**
    *   Application Start Date: 16.03.2026
    *   Application Last Date: 20.04.2026
    *   Shortlist Declaration: 30.04.2026
    *   Certificate Verification: 06.05.2026 - 08.05.2026 (Tentative)

**Category-wise Vacancy Breakdown:**

*   **Graduate Apprentices (Engineering/Technology):** 150
*   **Technician (Diploma) Apprentices:** 50
*   **Non-Engineering Graduate Apprentices:** 250

**Eligibility Criteria:**

*   Full-time Degree/Diploma from a recognized university/institution.
*   Candidates with distance education/correspondence degrees are NOT eligible.

**Selection Process:** Shortlisting based on qualifying exam marks & Certificate Verification.

**Note:** No obligation for employment upon completion of apprenticeship.

website_content.title: PSSSB Group D Recruitment 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## PSSSB Group D Recruitment 2026

The Punjab Subordinate Services Selection Board (PSSSB) has announced a recruitment drive for Group D Posts.

**Key Details:**

*   **Organization:** Subordinate Services Selection Board, Punjab (SSSB Punjab)
*   **Post Name:** Group-D
*   **Total Vacancies:** Anticipated posts (as per departmental requisitions till 30/09/2026)
*   **Advt No:** 04 of 2026
*   **Salary:** ₹18,000 - ₹56,900 (Level-1 as per 7th CPC)
*   **Educational Qualification:** Matriculation with Punjabi language
*   **Age Limit:** 18-37 years (as on 01/01/2026) (Relaxation applicable as per rules)
*   **Application Start Date:** 27/02/2026
*   **Application End Date:** 20/03/2026
*   **Application Mode:** Online

**Application Fee:**

*   General/Sports/Freedom Fighter: ₹1000
*   SC/BC/EWS: ₹250
*   ESM & Dependents: ₹200
*   Physical Handicapped: ₹500

**Selection Process:**

1.  Written Examination (Punjabi Qualifying & Merit-based)
2.  Document Verification
3.  Merit List (based on Part-B marks)

**Important Instructions:**

*   Only online applications are accepted.
*   Punjabi language qualification at Matric level is mandatory.
*   Age and qualifications are considered as of 01/01/2026.
*   Negative marking of 1/4 marks for incorrect answers.

website_content.title: FCRI MTAD Recruitment 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## Fluid Control Research Institute (FCRI), Palakkad - MTAD Recruitment 2026

**Organization:** Fluid Control Research Institute (FCRI), Palakkad

**Post:** Commercial Multi-Task Assistant-cum-Driver (MTAD)

**Total Vacancies:** 2 (tentative)

**Category:** UR

**Application Mode:** By Email only

**Important Dates:**
*   **Notification Release:** 13 March 2025
*   **Last Date to Apply:** 07 April 2026 (5:30 PM)

**Eligibility Criteria:**
*   **Educational Qualification:** Class X Pass
*   **Age Limit:** Maximum 30 years (as of 07 April 2026). Relaxation as per Govt. rules for SC/ST/OBC-NCL.
*   **Driving Licence:** Valid Driving Licence for Transport Vehicle / LMV with BADGE (as per Kerala Motor Vehicle Rules).
*   **Experience:** 1+ years of driving experience in a government firm/PSU/banks.

**Remuneration:**
*   **Consolidated Pay:** ₹17,500 per month
*   **Extra Duty Allowance:** ₹50 per hour
*   **Tenure:** 1 year (extendable by 1 year based on performance)

**Selection Process:** Driving Test + Personnel Assessment / Interview

**How to Apply:**
1.  Download the application form from [www.fcriindia.com](www.fcriindia.com).
2.  Fill, print, and sign the form.
3.  Attach self-attested copies of required documents.
4.  Scan everything into a single PDF.
5.  Email the PDF to careers@fcriindia.com with the subject line "MTAD 2026".

## MPSC Drug Inspector Admit Card 2026 OUT!

The Maharashtra Public Service Commission (MPSC) has released the admit card for the Drug Inspector recruitment on **14 March 2026**. Candidates who applied for the Drugs Inspector, Group B Screening Test 2025 can download their hall ticket from the official website.

**Key Details:**

*   **Release Date:** 14 March 2026
*   **Exam Date:** 22 March 2026 (Sunday)
*   **Official Website:** mpsc.gov.in
*   **Advertisement No.:** 116/2025
*   **Post:** Drugs Inspector, Group B Screening Test 2025

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit mpsc.gov.in or mpsconline.gov.in/candidate/login.
2.  Navigate to the "Admit Card"/"Admission Certificates" or "Latest Announcements" section.
3.  Click on "Advt No. 116/2025 Drugs Inspector Group B Screening Test 2025 - Admission Certificates".
4.  Enter Registration Number/Application Number, Date of Birth, and Captcha Code.
5.  Download and print the admit card (2-3 copies recommended).

**Important Documents to Carry:**

*   Admit Card (printed copy)
*   Valid Photo ID Proof (Aadhaar, Voter ID, Driving License, PAN Card, Passport)
*   Recent passport-size photographs (2 copies)
*   Blue/Black ballpoint pen

**Pro Tip:** Check all details on your admit card immediately after download and report any discrepancies to the MPSC helpdesk within 24 hours.

## AP Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026 - Guntur Zone III

The Government of Andhra Pradesh, Medical and Health Department, is recruiting 150 Staff Nurses on a contract basis for Government General Hospital (GGH) Piduguralla, Palnadu District.

**Key Details:**

*   **Organization:** Government of Andhra Pradesh, Medical and Health Department
*   **Post Name:** Staff Nurse
*   **Total Vacancies:** 150 (Zone III – Guntur)
*   **Type of Appointment:** Contract Basis (initially for 1 year)
*   **Location:** GGH Piduguralla, Palnadu District
*   **Educational Qualification:** GNM / B.Sc (Nursing) with registration with APNMC or relevant council
*   **Age Limit:** 42 years (as on 01.03.2026)
*   **Application Fee:** ₹500 (OC), ₹300 (SC/ST/BC/PH) - Demand Draft
*   **Application Mode:** Offline only
*   **Application Start Date:** 17 March 2026 (10:00 AM)
*   **Last Date to Apply:** 25 March 2026 by 05:00 PM
*   **Selection Process:** Merit List based on marks (Total 100 marks)

**Important Dates:**

*   Notification Issue Date: 17 March 2026
*   Application Proforma Available: 17 March 2026 (10:00 AM)
*   Last Date to Submit Application: 25 March 2026 by 05:00 PM

**How to Apply:**

Download the application proforma from the official website, fill it, and submit it offline along with required documents and a Demand Draft to the Office of the Regional Director of Medical and Health Services, Aswini Hospital Backside, Old Itukulabatti Road, Guntur.
