## Central University of Himachal Pradesh (CUHP) Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026

**Notification Date:** 27/03/2026
**Application Deadline:** 27/04/2026

CUHP has announced a recruitment drive for **25** vacancies for Assistant Professor positions.

**Eligibility:**
*   Master’s degree in the relevant subject with NET/SLET/SET or a Ph.D. degree.
*   Specific requirements vary by subject (see details below).

**Salary:** Rs. 57,700 - Rs. 2,18,200/- (Academic Level-10)

**Application Fee:**
*   UR/OBC(NCL)/EWS: Rs. 1750
*   SC/ST/PwD/Women: Rs. 1500

**Vacancy Details:**
*   Professor: 06
*   Associate Professor: 07
*   Assistant Professor: 12

**Selection Process:** Shortlisting based on Academic/Research Score, followed by Interview.

**How to Apply:** Online application through the official website.

**Important Note:** Candidates should download and carefully read the official notification PDF for detailed information on eligibility criteria, age limit, and application instructions.

**Subject-Specific Eligibility:**
*   **Assistant Professor (Computer Engineering and Robotics):** B.E./B.Tech./B.S. and M.E./ M.Tech./M.S. or Integrated M.Tech. in relevant branch with first class or equivalent. Ph.D. Research Specialization: Security and Cryptography, Quantum Computing, Data Mining.
*   **Assistant Professor (Economics, Library and Information Sciences, Punjabi and Dogri, Sanskrit, Visual Arts):** A Master's Degree with at least 55% marks.
*   **Assistant Professor (Animal Science, Computer Science and Informatics, Disaster Management, Education, HPKV Business School, History, Law, Mathematics, New Media, Political Science, Kashmir Studies, Yoga):** Master's degree in the relevant subject with NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. degree.

website_content.title: IIT JAM 2026 Scorecard Released
website_content.markdown_content:
## IIT JAM 2026 Scorecard Now Available!

The IIT JAM 2026 Scorecard is now released for candidates who appeared in the Joint Admission Test for Masters (JAM) 2026 conducted by IIT Bombay.  Access your scorecard through the JOAPS portal using your login credentials.

**Key Dates:**
*   **Result Announcement:** March 20, 2026
*   **Scorecard Availability:** March 27, 2026
*   **Answer Key Response Viewing:** February 18, 2026
*   **Answer Key Challenge Window:** February 27, 2026

**Important Links:**
*   Official Website: jam2026.iitb.ac.in
*   JOAPS Login: joaps.iitb.ac.in/login

**Scorecard Details:**
The scorecard includes candidate name, photograph, registration number, category, test paper details, marks obtained, All India Rank (AIR), and qualifying status.  It's essential for admissions to IITs, IISc, NITs, IISERs, and other CFTIs for M.Sc., Joint M.Sc.-Ph.D., and M.Sc.-Ph.D. Dual Degree programs.

**Download Process:**
1.  Visit jam2026.iitb.ac.in.
2.  Click on the “JOAPS Candidate Portal” link or go directly to joaps.iitb.ac.in/login.
3.  Enter your email ID/enrollment ID and password.
4.  Click “Submit / Login”.
5.  Download the scorecard in PDF format.

website_content.title: GGSIPU BA Liberal Arts (Hons) Admissions 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
# GGSIPU BA Liberal Arts (Hons) Admissions 2026

Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University (GGSIPU) has started online admissions for the BA (Liberal Arts) (Honours) program for the 2026-27 academic session.

## Overview

| Particulars | Details |
|---|---| 
| University Name | Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University (GGSIPU) |
| Programme Name | BA (Liberal Arts) (Honours) |
| Academic Session | 2026-27 |
| Admission Type | Undergraduate admission (regular/full-time) |
| Admission Mode | Online through [ipu.admissions.nic.in](ipu.admissions.nic.in) |
| Basis of Admission | As per GGSIPU rules (entrance/merit/other criteria) |
| Application Mode | Online registration and fee payment |

## Important Dates

| Event | Date |
|---|---| 
| Application Process Begins | Active as of March 2026 |
| Last Date to Apply Online (Registration) | March 31, 2026 |

## Eligibility Criteria

*   Educational qualification: Class 12 / equivalent from a recognized board.
*   Minimum aggregate marks requirement in 10+2 (as per official bulletin).
*   Subject-specific conditions (English may be compulsory).
*   Age criteria (upper age limit) if mentioned in the university rules.
*   Reservation and relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwD as per Government/University norms.

## Application Process

1.  Visit [ipu.admissions.nic.in](ipu.admissions.nic.in).
2.  Click on “New Candidate Registration” and create a profile.
3.  Verify your email/mobile (if required).
4.  Login and choose BA (Liberal Arts) (Honours).
5.  Fill in details carefully.
6.  Upload scanned documents.
7.  Pay the application fee online.
8.  Submit and download the confirmation page.

## Course Details

*   **Duration:** 3 or 4 years.
*   **Description:** Multidisciplinary program with exposure to humanities, social sciences, and allied disciplines.
*   **Skills:** Critical thinking, writing, communication, interdisciplinary learning.
*   **Career Pathways:** Higher studies, civil services, research, corporate roles, development sector.

## Documents Required

*   Class 10 & 12 mark sheets and certificates.
*   Passport-size photograph and signature.
*   Category/reservation certificate (if applicable).

Admission via university-level entrance test, national-level test score, or merit based on Class 12 marks, as per GGSIPU rules. Merit list/rank list, counselling schedule, and seat allotment details will be published on [ipu.admissions.nic.in](ipu.admissions.nic.in).

## Information Brochure

Available at [ipu.admissions.nic.in](ipu.admissions.nic.in).

website_content.title: SAMS Odisha PG CPET 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## SAMS Odisha PG CPET 2026 - Overview

The Common Post Graduate Entrance Test (CPET) 2026 is the gateway for PG admissions into Odisha state universities and colleges.

**Key Details:**

*   **Exam Name:** Common Post Graduate Entrance Test (CPET) 2026
*   **Conducting Authority:** Student Academic Management System (SAMS), Higher Education Department, Odisha
*   **Exam Type:** State-level entrance test for PG admission
*   **Academic Session:** 2026-27
*   **Application Mode:** Online

**Important Dates:**

*   **Online Application Start Date:** February 27, 2026
*   **Last Date to Apply:** March 2026
*   **Admit Card Release:** Late April 2026 (Approx. April 23)
*   **CPET Exam Date:** May 5 - May 18, 2026
*   **Result & Merit List:** July 2026
*   **PG Admission Process:** August 2026

**Eligibility Criteria:**

*   Bachelor’s degree in a relevant discipline from a recognized university.
*   45-50% aggregate marks (varies by subject/university).
*   Must be a resident of Odisha or fulfill specific university policies.

**Exam Pattern:**

*   **Mode:** Offline (OMR-based)
*   **Type:** Multiple Choice Questions (MCQs)
*   **Total Marks:** 70
*   **Duration:** 90 minutes
*   **Selection Process:** CPET marks + career marks (graduation and +2 level)

website_content.title: ECIL Recruitment 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## ECIL Recruitment 2026 - Walk-In Selection

Electronics Corporation of India Limited (ECIL) is conducting walk-in selections for various contract posts.

**Posts:** Project Engineer, Technical Officer, Assistant Project Engineer, Senior Artisan

**Locations:** New Delhi, Chandigarh, Ferozepur, Pathankot, Rawatbhata, Mumbai, Kakrapar, Bengaluru, Kaiga, Kudankulam, Kalpakkam, Chennai.

**Key Details:**
*   **Tenure:** Initial 1 year, extendable up to 4 years (2 years for Kudankulam PE-C).
*   **Emoluments:** Up to Rs. 55,000 (Project Engineers).
*   **Walk-in Dates:**
    *   Mumbai, New Delhi, Bengaluru: April 9, 2026 (09:00 - 11:30 hrs)
    *   Chennai: April 18, 2026 (09:00 - 11:30 hrs)
*   **Age Limit:** 30-33 years (UR).
*   **Qualification:** BE/B.Tech, Diploma, ITI (depending on the post).
*   **Application Fee:** None
*   **Selection Process:** Walk-in registration, document verification, and personal interview.

**Important Note:** Candidates must download the application form from [www.ecil.co.in](www.ecil.co.in), fill it, and carry it with original and self-attested documents to the walk-in venue. No online submission is allowed.

For detailed information, including post-wise qualifications and experience, refer to the official notification.

website_content.title: CBSE Class 12 Biology Answer Key 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## CBSE Class 12 Biology Answer Key 2026

The Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) conducted the Class 12 Biology exam on **March 27, 2026**, from **10:30 AM to 1:30 PM**.  

An unofficial answer key has been prepared by subject experts to help students evaluate their performance. Students can use this to estimate their scores out of **70 marks** (theory paper), with the remaining **30 marks** for practical/internal assessment.

### Exam Highlights

| Particulars | Details |
|---|---| 
| Conducting Board | Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) |
| Exam Name | CBSE Class 12 Biology Exam 2026 |
| Subject Code | 044 |
| Exam Date | March 27, 2026 |
| Exam Time | 10:30 AM - 1:30 PM |
| Total Marks | 100 (70 Theory + 30 Practical) |

### Marking Scheme

| Section | Question Type | Marks Per Question | Total Marks |
|---|---|---|---| 
| Section A | MCQs | 1 | 16 |
| Section B | Very Short Answer | 2 | 10 |
| Section C | Short Answer | 3 | 21 |
| Section D | Case-based | 4 | 8 |
| Section E | Long Answer | 5 | 15 |
| Total |  |  | 70 Marks |

**Note:** A minimum of 33% marks is required to pass.

### How to Download

1. Visit trusted education portals or coaching institute websites.
2. Search for 'CBSE Class 12 Biology Answer Key 2026'.
3. Select the correct set (Set 1, Set 2, Set 3, etc.).
4. Open the PDF answer key.
5. Compare your answers and calculate your expected score.

website_content.title: Uniraj Admit Card 2026 Released
website_content.markdown_content:
## Uniraj Admit Card 2026 – Download Now!

The University of Rajasthan (Uniraj), Jaipur has released the admit card for Undergraduate (UG) exams 2026. Students can download their hall tickets from the official ERP portal.

**Key Details:**

*   **University:** University of Rajasthan (Uniraj), Jaipur
*   **Exam Type:** Undergraduate (UG) exams
*   **Academic Session:** 2025–26
*   **Admit Card Year:** 2026
*   **Mode:** Online only
*   **Status:** Released / Available for Download

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit [erp.univraj.org](erp.univraj.org).
2.  Click on “Student Login / ERP Login”.
3.  Enter your User ID/Enrollment Number and Password/Date of Birth.
4.  Navigate to the “Examination / Admit Card” section.
5.  Select your course, year/semester, and exam.
6.  Download the admit card PDF.

**Details on Admit Card:**

*   Student’s Name
*   Father’s & Mother’s Name
*   Enrollment/Registration Number
*   Exam Roll Number
*   Exam Centre Details
*   Exam Date & Time
*   Subject & Paper Codes
*   Important Instructions

**Important Dates (General):**

*   Admit Card Availability: Released before exams in 2026.
*   UG Exams: Scheduled as per the official time table for 2025-26.
*   Exam Period: Late February/Early March – April (course-wise).

**Eligibility:**

*   Students who have submitted the Rajasthan University exam form for 2025–26.
*   Regular, non-college, private, and ex-students (where applicable).

**Important Instructions:**

*   Carry a printed copy of the admit card.
*   Bring a valid photo ID.
*   Reach the exam centre before reporting time.
*   Read all exam-day instructions carefully.

website_content.title: Jadavpur University MSc Diploma in Medical Physics Admission 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## Jadavpur University MSc Diploma in Medical Physics Admission 2026

**Overview:**

*   **University Name:** Jadavpur University, Kolkata
*   **Course Name:** Post M.Sc. Diploma in Medical Physics
*   **Academic Session:** 2026-27
*   **Programme Level:** Post M.Sc. Diploma (Medical Physics)
*   **Application Mode:** Online

**Important Dates:**

*   **Notification Publication:** March 2026
*   **Application Start Date:** 30 March 2026
*   **Application Last Date:** To be announced

**Eligibility Criteria:**

*   **Required Qualification:** M.Sc. in Physics / relevant subject
*   **Minimum Marks:** As per university norms (refer to notification)

**How to Apply:**

1.  Visit the official Jadavpur University website ([jadavpuruniversity.in](jadavpuruniversity.in)).
2.  Navigate to the “Admissions / Notifications” section.
3.  Open the Post M.Sc. Diploma in Medical Physics admission 2026-27 notification.
4.  Register and create login credentials.
5.  Fill in the application form with required details.
6.  Upload scanned documents (photo, signature, mark sheets, etc.).
7.  Pay the application fee online.
8.  Submit the form and download the confirmation page.

**Course Details:**

*   **Nature of Course:** Focuses on Medical Physics and radiation applications in healthcare.
*   **Duration:** 1-2 years (as per notification).
*   **Training Areas:** Radiation physics, imaging, radiotherapy, radiation safety, hospital exposure.

**Selection Process:** Based on academic merit (M.Sc. marks), entrance test, interview, or a combination (as per notification).

website_content.title: BARC Research Associate Fellowship 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## BARC Research Associate (RA) Fellowship Recruitment 2026

**Advertisement No.:** 3/2026(R-V)

**Department:** Bhabha Atomic Research Centre (BARC), Trombay, Mumbai

**Post Name:** Research Associate (RA) Fellowship

**Total Vacancies:** 56

**Fellowship Level:** RA-I / RA-II / RA-III

**Fellowship Amount:**
*   RA-I: Rs. 58,000/- p.m. + Contingency Grant + HRA
*   RA-II & RA-III: As per BARC norms

**Essential Qualification:** Ph.D. in relevant discipline (Chemical Sciences, Physics, Engineering, Biosciences, Agriculture, etc.) or B.Tech/M.Tech for select projects.

**Age Limit:** Not specified; as per BARC/DST norms

**Application Mode:** Offline only - by post; no online/email applications accepted

**Application Fee:** No application fee

**Last Date to Apply:** 24 Apr 2026

**Selection Process:** Screening of applications + Interview

**Website:** http://www.barc.gov.in

**Key Dates:**
*   Advertisement Publication Date: March 2026
*   Last date to submit application: 24 Apr 2026

**Note:** Applications must be sent to:
Deputy Establishment Officer, Recruitment-V, Central Complex, BARC, Trombay, Mumbai - 400085

Apply separately for each Research Project with a separate set of documents.

2.  Navigate to the "Recruitment" or "What's New" section.
3.  Click on "IB ACIO Tier-3 Interview Call Letter 2026".
4.  Enter your credentials (User ID/Registration Number/Application Sequence Number, Password, Captcha).
5.  Download and save the PDF.

**Important Documents to Carry:**

*   IB ACIO Interview Call Letter (printed copy)
*   Valid Photo ID Proof (Aadhaar, Voter ID, Driving License, PAN, Passport)
*   Educational Qualification Certificates
*   Category Certificate (if applicable)
*   Passport-size photographs

**Important Instructions:**

*   Check your registered email (including spam) for direct links and details.
*   Reach the venue 45-60 minutes before reporting time.
*   Carry only allowed items (no mobile phones, bags, or study materials).

website_content.markdown_content:
## DSSSB Tier-I Result 2026 Out! 

The Delhi Subordinate Services Selection Board (DSSSB) has released the Tier-I result for Assistant Section Officer (ASO) and Combined Exam posts on **27 March 2026**. 

**Key Details:**

*   **Recruiting Body:** Delhi Subordinate Services Selection Board (DSSSB)
*   **Post Name:** Assistant Section Officer (ASO) & Combined Exam Posts (LDC, Junior Assistant, Stenographer etc.)
*   **Result Type:** Tier-I Marks & Shortlisting
*   **Declaration Date:** 27 March 2026
*   **Exam Dates:**
    *   ASO: August 18-22 & 27, 2025
    *   Combined: October 1,4,5,8-11,13-17,21,22,27,29,30 2025
*   **Selection Stages:** Tier-I (Qualifying) → Tier-II / Skill Test → Document Verification
*   **Official Website:** [dsssb.delhi.gov.in](dsssb.delhi.gov.in) & [dsssbonline.nic.in](dsssbonline.nic.in)

**Vacancies & Shortlisted Candidates:**

*   Combined Exam (Post Code 802/23): 3,050 vacancies, 25,385 shortlisted for Skill Test
*   ASO (Post Code 101/23 in SCERT): 13 vacancies, shortlisted for Tier-II Exam

**How to Check Your Result:**

1.  Visit [dsssbonline.nic.in](dsssbonline.nic.in)
2.  Click on “View Marks” or “Result” section
3.  Select the relevant Post Code (101/23 for ASO or 802/23 for Combined)
4.  Enter your Application Number / Roll Number, Date of Birth or Password
5.  View and download your scorecard.

**Important:** Download and save your marks statement immediately and prepare for the next stage!

## VMOU RSCIT Admit Card 2026 - Latest Update

The Rajasthan Knowledge Corporation Limited (RKCL) and Vardhman Mahaveer Open University (VMOU), Kota have released the RSCIT admit card for the 2026 examinations.

**Key Details:**

*   **Exam Name:** Rajasthan State Certificate in Information Technology (RSCIT) Exam 2026
*   **Conducting Body:** RKCL & VMOU, Kota
*   **Admit Card Status:** Released
*   **Download Mode:** Online Only
*   **Exam Dates:** 29 March 2026 & 12 April 2026
*   **Exam Mode:** Offline, OMR-Based
*   **Exam Duration:** 1 Hour

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit the official portal: rkcl.vmou.ac.in
2.  Click on the “RSCIT Admit Card 2026” link.
3.  Select your exam district.
4.  Enter your roll number or search by name/DOB.

*   Candidate’s Name, Photo, Signature

*   Exam Date, Shift & Duration
*   Reporting Time & Exam Timing (10:00 AM – 11:00 AM)
*   Exam Centre Details
*   Important Instructions

**Important Instructions:**

*   Carry a printed admit card and a valid photo ID.
*   Reach the centre by 8:30 AM.
*   Do not bring electronic gadgets.
*   Read instructions carefully.

## RRB Technician Grade I Answer Key 2026 Released!

The Railway Recruitment Board (RRB) has released the answer key for the Technician Grade I examination held on March 6, 9, 10, and 13, 2026. Candidates can download the provisional answer key from the official website.

**Key Details:**

*   **Organization:** Railway Recruitment Board (RRB)
*   **Post Name:** Technician Grade I
*   **Total Vacancies:** 183
*   **Exam Date:** 06, 09, 10, 13 March 2026
*   **Answer Key Status:** Released (March 28, 2026)
*   **Last Date for Objection:** Check official portal (typically 7-10 days from release - expected around April 6, 2026)

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit the official candidate portal: [https://rrb.digialm.com//EForms/configuredHtml/33128/98138/login.html](https://rrb.digialm.com//EForms/configuredHtml/33128/98138/login.html) or regional RRB website.
2.  Navigate to the "Answer Key" or "Recruitment" section.
3.  Click on "RRB Technician Grade I Answer Key 2026".
4.  Log in using your Registration Number and Password/Date of Birth.

**Objection Process:**

*   **Objection Fee:** ₹50 per question (refundable if accepted).
*   **Deadline:**  Strictly before the last date.

**Marking Scheme:**

*   Correct Answer: +1 mark
*   Wrong Answer: -1/3 mark
*   Unattempted: 0 marks

website_content.markdown_content:
## NARL Recruitment 2026

National Atmospheric Research Laboratory (NARL) has announced recruitment for Scientist/Engineer and Junior Research Fellow (JRF) positions.

**Key Details:**

*   **Total Vacancies:** 15 (1 Scientist/Engineer 'SD', 1 Scientist/Engineer 'SC', 13 JRF)
*   **Job Location:** Gadanki, Andhra Pradesh
*   **Application Dates:** 28 March 2026 - 27 April 2026
*   **Application Mode:** Online only

**Post-wise Details:**

*   **Scientist/Engineer ‘SD’:** PhD in relevant field, Max Age: 35 years
*   **Scientist/Engineer ‘SC’:** M.E./M.Tech in RF, Microwave & Communication System Engineering, Max Age: 30 years
*   **Junior Research Fellow (JRF):** PG/relevant Engineering PG with NET/GATE/JAM/JEST, Preferably Max Age: 28 years (relaxation applicable)

**Pay Scale:**

*   Scientist/Engineer SD: Rs. 67,700 - 2,08,700
*   Scientist/Engineer SC: Rs. 56,100 - 1,77,500
*   JRF: Rs. 37,000 - 42,000 p.m. + allowances

**Important Links:**

*   [Notification PDF - Scientist/Engineer](https://www.narl.gov.in)
*   [Notification PDF - JRF](https://www.narl.gov.in)

**Apply Online:** https://www.narl.gov.in

website_content.markdown_content:
## AIIMS INI-CET July 2026 Session - Application Open

The Institute of National Importance Combined Entrance Test (INI-CET) is open for applications for MD, MS, DM (6 years), MCh (6 years) and MDS programmes.

**Key Details:**

*   **Exam Name:** INI-CET July 2026 Session
*   **Courses:** MD, MS, DM (6 years), MCh (6 years), MDS
*   **Application Mode:** Online
*   **Exam Mode:** Computer-based test (CBT)
*   **Exam Date:** Mid-May 2026 (e.g., 16 May 2026)

**Important Dates:**

*   **Basic/OTR Registration Start:** 2nd March 2026
*   **Basic Registration Window:** 2–10 March 2026
*   **Status/Image Correction:** Early to Mid-April 2026
*   **Final Registration/Fee Payment End:** Late April 2026 (approx. 21st April)
*   **Final Registration Status:** 4th May 2026

**Eligibility Criteria:**

*   MBBS/BDS degree from a recognized university.
*   Completed compulsory rotating internship.
*   Minimum aggregate percentage (typically 55% for General/OBC, 50% for SC/ST).

**Application Process:**

1.  Visit the AIIMS exam portal.
2.  Log in or complete One Time Registration (OTR).
3.  Complete basic registration.
4.  Generate EUC.
5.  Fill final registration form and pay the fee.

**Application Fee:** Category-wise fees apply, payable online.

**Documents Required:**

*   Scanned photograph and signature.
*   MBBS/BDS degree details.
*   Category certificate (if applicable).
*   Photo ID proof.

website_content.title: JEPBN 2026 Notification
website_content.markdown_content:
## JEPBN 2026 Notification - Post Basic Nursing Entrance Exam

The West Bengal Joint Entrance Examinations Board (WBJEEB) has released the information bulletin for the Joint Entrance Test for Post Basic Nursing (JEPBN) 2026-27.

**Key Details:**

*   **Exam Name:** JEPBN 2026 (Joint Entrance Test for Post Basic Nursing 2026)
*   **Course:** Post Basic Nursing (PBN)
*   **Academic Session:** 2026-27
*   **Exam Date & Time:** 07 June 2026 (Sunday), 11:00 a.m. to 12:30 p.m.
*   **Exam Mode:** OMR-based Common Entrance Test
*   **Application Fee:** ₹3000 + bank charges
*   **Information Bulletin Release Date:** 25 March 2026
*   **Helpline:** Toll-free 1800-1234-782 (Extn. 2), Email: info@wbjeeb.in

**Eligibility Criteria:**

*   Citizenship: Must be a citizen of India.
*   Domicile: Must be a domicile of West Bengal (with exceptions for certain government employees).
*   Educational Qualification: 10+2 level examination from a recognized board + GNM course from an Indian Nursing Council recognized institute + RNRM certificate from State Nursing Council.
*   Age Limit: Up to 53 years for West Bengal State Government employees; No upper age limit for others.

**Exam Pattern:**

*   Total Questions: 100 (Multiple Choice)
*   Duration: 90 minutes
*   Part A (40 questions): Anatomy, Physiology, Sociology, Psychology, Pharmacology, Microbiology, Nutrition, Pathology.
*   Part B (60 questions): Foundation of Nursing, Medical Surgical Nursing, Pediatric Nursing, Psychiatric Nursing, Obstetrical Nursing, Community Health Nursing.
*   Marking: +1 for correct answer, -0.25 for incorrect answer.

**Important Dates:**

website_content.title: UP CNET 2026 Registration Open
website_content.markdown_content:
## UP CNET 2026 Registration

Registration for the Common Nursing Entrance Test (UP CNET) 2026 is now open for admission to B.Sc Nursing, Post Basic B.Sc Nursing, M.Sc Nursing, and NPCC courses under Atal Bihari Vajpayee Medical University, Uttar Pradesh.

**Key Details:**

*   **Exam Name:** Common Nursing Entrance Test (UP CNET) 2026
*   **Conducting University:** Atal Bihari Vajpayee Medical University, Uttar Pradesh (ABVMU)
*   **Courses Covered:** B.Sc Nursing, Post Basic B.Sc Nursing, M.Sc Nursing, NPCC
*   **Session:** 2025–2026
*   **Application Mode:** Online only
*   **Exam Mode:** Offline/Online (as per official notice)

**Important Dates:**

*   **Registration Start:** March 28, 2026
*   **Application Deadline:** Expected late May to early June 2026

**Application Fees:**

*   ₹3,000 for UR/OBC
*   ₹2,000 for SC/ST/PwD

**Eligibility Criteria (Highlights):**

*   **B.Sc Nursing:** 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry, Biology, and English.
*   **Post Basic B.Sc Nursing:** Passed GNM and registered with State Nursing Council.
*   **M.Sc Nursing / NPCC:** B.Sc Nursing or Post Basic B.Sc Nursing.
*   Must be an Indian citizen.

**Documents Required:**

*   10th & 12th mark sheets and certificates
*   GNM/B.Sc Nursing/Post Basic B.Sc Nursing mark sheets and degree certificates
*   Nursing registration certificate (if applicable)
*   Category/caste certificate (if applicable)
*   Passport-size photograph and signature
*   Valid photo ID proof

*   **Exam Date:** 09 April 2026
*   **Application Start Date:** 24 April 2025 (Completed)
*   **Application Last Date:** 26 May 2025 (Completed)

*   **Total Vacancies:** 21 Posts
*   **Advertisement No.:** A-2/E-2/2025

website_content.title: PSSSB JE Answer Key 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## PSSSB JE Answer Key 2026 Released!

The Punjab Subordinate Service Selection Board (PSSSB) has released the Provisional Answer Key for the Junior Engineer (Civil/Mechanical/Electrical) examination held on **28th March 2026**. 

**Key Details:**

*   **Organization:** Punjab Subordinate Service Selection Board (PSSSB)
*   **Post Name:** Junior Engineer (Civil/Mechanical/Electrical)
*   **Exam Date:** 28th March 2026
*   **Answer Key Status:** Released (Provisional)
*   **Release Date:** 29th March 2026
*   **Last Date for Objection:** 31st March 2026 (5 PM)

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit the official website: [sssb.punjab.gov.in](sssb.punjab.gov.in)
2.  Navigate to the “What’s New” section.
3.  Find the link for “OMR Sheet for: Link for downloading provisional answer keys and OMR for written examination dated 28.03.2026 for various posts”.
4.  Click on the link and select your post.
5.  Click on “Provisional Answer Key” to view answers.
6.  For OMR Sheet: Click the respective link, enter Application Number and Date of Birth.

**How to Raise Objections:**

1.  Download the Grievance Form from the official website.
2.  Fill the form with question number and correct answer, providing valid proof.
3.  Scan the form and supporting documents.
4.  Email to ssbtestpup2022@gmail.com before **31st March 2026 (5 PM)**.

**Important Dates:**

*   Exam Conducted: 28th March 2026
*   Answer Key Released: 29th March 2026
*   Objection Deadline: 31st March 2026 (5 PM)
*   Final Answer Key (Expected): April 2026
*   Result Declaration (Expected): April/May 2026

## UPPSC PCS Final Result 2026 OUT! 

The Uttar Pradesh Public Service Commission (UPPSC) has released the final result for the Combined State/Upper Subordinate Services Examination 2024 (PCS 2024 cycle) on **29th March 2026**. A total of **932 candidates** have been selected against **947 vacancies**. 

**Key Details:**

*   **Recruiting Body:** Uttar Pradesh Public Service Commission (UPPSC)
*   **Post Name:** Combined State/Upper Subordinate Services (PCS) - Various Posts (Deputy Collector, DSP, etc.)
*   **Result Type:** Final Result (After Mains + Interview)
*   **Result Declaration Date:** 29th March 2026 (PDF released on 30th March 2026)
*   **Exam Cycle:** PCS 2024 (Advt. No. A-1/E-1/2024)
*   **Selection Stages:** Prelims → Mains → Interview → Document Verification
*   **Official Website:** uppsc.up.nic.in

**How to Check:**

1.  Visit the official website: uppsc.up.nic.in
2.  Go to the “What’s New” or “Results” section.
3.  Click on the link “LIST OF SELECTED CANDIDATES IN ADVT. NO. A-1/E-1/2024, COMBINED STATE/UPPER SUBORDINATE SERVICES EXAMINATION, 2024”.
4.  Search for your Roll Number in the PDF.

The merit list contains Roll Number, Candidate Name, Category, and Post Allotted.  Selected candidates should download and print the merit list, and await official appointment letters.

website_content.title: IIT Madras PG Admissions 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## IIT Madras MTech, MSc, and MA Admissions 2026

Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras) is now accepting applications for its MTech, MSc, and MA programs for the academic session 2026. Applications are accepted online through the official portal [mtechadm.iitm.ac.in](https://mtechadm.iitm.ac.in).

**Key Highlights:**

*   **Programmes Offered:** MTech (various specializations), MSc (various specializations), MA (Development Studies, English Studies, Economics, and more).
*   **Admission Mode:** Entrance-based/Merit-based (GATE, JAM, institute tests).
*   **Application Mode:** Online

**Important Dates:**

*   Application Opens: March 28, 2026
*   Application Closes: April 27, 2026
*   COAP Registration (GATE Candidates): Starts March 26, 2026
*   Admission Offers (Round 1): Starts May 11, 2026
*   Reporting/Registration Date: July 20, 2026
*   Commencement of Classes: July 27, 2026

**Eligibility Criteria (General):**

*   Bachelor's degree from a recognized university.
*   Minimum percentage/CGPA as specified by IIT Madras.
*   Valid GATE/JAM score (where applicable).

**Application Fee:**

*   SC/ST/PwD/Female: Rs. 300
*   All Others: Rs. 600

**Documents Required:**

*   Photograph
*   Signature
*   Class 10 & 12 Marksheets
*   Semester Marksheets & Degree Certificates
*   GATE/JAM Scorecard (if applicable)
*   Category Certificates (if applicable)
*   ID Proof

**Official Links:**

*   [Admission Portal](https://mtechadm.iitm.ac.in)
*   [IIT Madras Website](https://www.iitm.ac.in/)

website_content.title: IIMC PGDMJ 2026-27 Notification
website_content.markdown_content:
# IIMC PGDMJ 2026-27 Notification

The Indian Institute of Mass Communication (IIMC) has released the admission notification for the Post Graduate Diploma in Media & Journalism (PGDMJ) 2026-27 session.

## Overview

*   **Institute Name:** Indian Institute of Mass Communication (IIMC)
*   **Programme Name:** Post Graduate Diploma in Media & Journalism (PGDMJ)
*   **Academic Session:** 2026-27
*   **Programme Type:** Full-time Post Graduate Diploma
*   **Mode of Admission:** Entrance test and subsequent selection process
*   **Application Mode:** Online via Google Form

## Important Dates

*   **Registration Start:** 14 December 2025
*   **Registration Last Date:** 20 January 2026
*   **Correction Window:** 28 January 2026
*   **City Intimation Slip:** February 2026
*   **CUET PG Exam Dates:** Likely March 2026

## Eligibility Criteria

*   Bachelor’s degree in any discipline from a recognised university.
*   Final-year undergraduate students are also eligible (subject to degree completion).

## Selection Process

The selection process includes an entrance test (if applicable), interview, and/or group discussion.

## How to Apply

1.  Visit the official IIMC website: iimc.gov.in.
2.  Navigate to the Admissions/Announcements section.
3.  Click on the PGDMJ 2026-27 Application Form link.
4.  Fill the form carefully and submit it before the deadline.

## Key Guidelines

*   Read the complete information brochure before applying.
*   Ensure you meet all eligibility criteria.
*   Use your own email ID and mobile number for registration.
*   Upload documents in the correct format and size.

The Punjab Subordinate Service Selection Board (PSSSB) has released the admit card for the Group D recruitment exam on **31 March 2026**. Candidates can download their hall tickets from the official website.

*   **Exam Date:** 05 April 2026
*   **Total Vacancies:** 406 Posts

*   **Exam Mode:** Offline (MCQ-Based Pen & Paper)

website_content.title: TNPSC Group I Mains Result 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## TNPSC Group I Mains Result 2026 OUT! 

The Tamil Nadu Public Service Commission (TNPSC) has released the results for the Combined Civil Services Examination – I (Group I Services) Mains exam held between **December 1st and 4th, 2025**. The result was declared on **March 30th, 2026**. 

**Key Details:**

*   **Result Declaration Date:** March 30, 2026
*   **Exam Dates:** December 1 - December 4, 2025
*   **Shortlisted Candidates:** 160 for Certificate Verification & Interview (Group I), 10 for Physical Standards Verification & Endurance Test (Group IA - Assistant Conservator of Forests)
*   **Selection Stages:** Mains Exam → Certificate Verification & Interview → Final Selection
*   **Interview Dates (Group I):** April 15 & 16, 2026 (at TNPSC Office, Chennai)

**How to Check:**

1.  Visit the official website: [www.tnpsc.gov.in](www.tnpsc.gov.in)
2.  Navigate to the “Results” or “Latest Results” section.
3.  Download the PDF list for your respective Group (I or IA).
4.  Search for your Roll Number using Ctrl+F.

**Important Instructions:**

*   Download and save the PDF.
*   Keep original documents ready for verification.
*   Check the website regularly for updates.
*   Final selection is based on Mains marks + Interview marks.

website_content.title: NABARD Development Assistant 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## NABARD Development Assistant Syllabus 2026

The National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development (NABARD) has released the detailed syllabus for the Development Assistant Exam 2026 (including Development Assistant Hindi). 

**Key Details:**

*   **Exam Name:** NABARD Development Assistant Exam 2026
*   **Conducting Body:** National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development (NABARD)
*   **Post Name:** Development Assistant & Development Assistant (Hindi)
*   **Total Vacancies:** 162
*   **Exam Mode:** Online (CBT)
*   **Exam Type:** Objective (MCQ) + Descriptive (Mains)
*   **Total Questions:** Prelims: 100; Mains: 150 Objective + 3 Descriptive
*   **Total Marks:** Prelims: 100; Mains: 200
*   **Exam Duration:** Prelims: 60 Minutes; Mains: 135 Minutes
*   **Negative Marking:** Yes (0.25 marks deducted for each wrong answer)
*   **Selection Process:** Prelims (Qualifying) + Mains + Language Proficiency Test (if applicable)
*   **Exam Language:** English/Hindi

**Exam Pattern:**

**Prelims (60 mins):**
*   English Language: 40 Questions (40 Marks)
*   Quantitative Aptitude: 30 Questions (30 Marks)
*   Reasoning Ability: 30 Questions (30 Marks)

**Mains (135 mins):**
*   Test of Reasoning: 30 Questions (30 Marks)
*   Quantitative Aptitude: 30 Questions (30 Marks)
*   General Awareness: 50 Questions (50 Marks)
*   Computer Knowledge: 40 Questions (40 Marks)
*   Descriptive English: 3 Questions (50 Marks)

**Important Dates:**
*   Prelims: 21 Feb 2026
*   Mains: 12 Apr 2026

**Syllabus Topics:**
*   English Language
*   Quantitative Aptitude
*   Reasoning Ability
*   Computer Knowledge
*   General Awareness (Agriculture, Rural Development & Banking)
*   Descriptive English (Essay, Precis, Report/Letter Writing)

Download the official syllabus PDF for detailed information.

website_content.markdown_content:
## GSEB HSC Answer Key 2026 - Science Stream

The Gujarat Secondary and Higher Secondary Education Board (GSEB) has released the provisional answer key for the HSC Science (Class 12) exams held in February-March 2026. Students can download the PDF answer key to check solutions and estimate their scores.

**Key Details:**

*   **Board:** Gujarat Secondary and Higher Secondary Education Board (GSEB)
*   **Class:** HSC - Class 12 Board Exam 2026
*   **Stream:** Science (Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, Biology, etc.)
*   **Exam Session:** February - March 2026
*   **Answer Key Type:** Provisional
*   **Format:** PDF (Question-wise solutions)

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit the official GSEB portal: [gseb.org](gseb.org) or [gsebeservice.com](gsebeservice.com).
2.  Locate the latest notification for the HSC Science answer key.
3.  Access and download the PDF.
4.  Find your subject and paper code.

**Subjects Covered:**

*   Physics
*   Chemistry
*   Mathematics
*   Biology
*   Other Science-related subjects

**Important Dates:**

*   **Provisional Answer Key Release:** Late March 2026
*   **Objection Window:** 3-5 days after release
*   **Final Answer Key Release:** Early May 2026
*   **Result Date:** Mid-to-Late May 2026

**Objection Process:** Students can challenge the provisional answer key by submitting objections with supporting evidence through the prescribed method on the GSEB website within the specified timeframe.

## Jharkhand Home Guard Recruitment 2026 - Deoghar District

**Advertisement No.:** 01/2026

**Total Vacancies:** 772 (Rural: 634, Urban: 138)

**Key Details:**

*   **Age Limit:** 19-40 years (as of 01.01.2026)
*   **Qualification:**
    *   Rural: 7th Pass
    *   Urban: Matric (10th) Pass
*   **Application Fee:** ₹200/- (Non-refundable)
*   **Application Mode:** Online only (through JAP-IT portal)
*   **Important Dates:**
    *   Online Application Start: 30-03-2026
    *   Last Date to Apply: 30-04-2026
    *   Age & Eligibility Cut-off: 01-01-2026

**Selection Process:**

1.  Physical Efficiency Test
2.  Hindi Writing Ability Test
3.  Technical Proficiency Test (for Urban Technical candidates)
4.  Document Verification & Medical Examination
5.  Basic Training

**Note:** This is a voluntary service, not a regular salaried position.

website_content.title: MAHA TET 2026 Notification
website_content.markdown_content:
## MAHA TET 2026 - Overview

**Exam Name:** Maharashtra Teacher Eligibility Test (MAHA TET)
**Conducting Body:** Maharashtra State Examination Council, Pune
**Exam Level:** State-level eligibility test for teachers
**Session:** June 2026

**Important Dates:**
*   **Notification Release Date:** 25-27 March 2026
*   **Application Start Date:** 27 March 2026
*   **Last Date to Apply:** 17 April 2026
*   **Exam Date:** 21 June 2026

**Papers:**
*   Paper I (Classes 1-5)
*   Paper II (Classes 6-8)

**Application Mode:** Online only

**Application Fee:**
| Category | Fee Details | 
|---|---| 
| General/OBC/EWS/SEBC/NT | ₹1,000 (One Paper), ₹1,200 (Both Papers) | 
| SC/ST/Divyang (PwD) | ₹700 (One Paper), ₹900 (Both Papers) |

**Eligibility Criteria (Brief):**
*   **Paper I:** 10+2 with D.El.Ed or equivalent.
*   **Paper II:** Graduation with D.El.Ed / B.Ed or equivalent.

**Exam Pattern:** Offline, Pen-and-Paper OMR based. MCQs with no negative marking (check official notification for latest pattern).

**Official Websites:**
*   [Maharashtra State Examination Council](Click Here)
*   [MAHA TET Official Website](Click Here)

website_content.title: Assam SLET 2026 Answer Key Released
website_content.markdown_content:
## Assam SLET 2026 Answer Key – Download Now!

The State Level Eligibility Test Commission, Assam (NE Region) has released the provisional answer key for the Assam SLET 2026 examination held on **15th March 2026**. 

**Key Details:**

*   **Exam Date:** 15th March 2026
*   **Answer Key Release Date:** 31st March 2026
*   **Objection Deadline:** 10th April 2026
*   **Objection Fee:** ₹100 per question
*   **Marking Scheme:** +2 marks for correct answers, 0 marks for incorrect/unattempted answers (no negative marking).

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit [www.sletne.org](www.sletne.org)
2.  Navigate to the "Notification" section.
3.  Click on the link titled “Answers to the Questions of SET, 2026”.

**How to Raise an Objection:**

1.  Visit [www.sletne.org](www.sletne.org) and log in to the objection portal.
2.  Select the question(s) to challenge.
3.  Upload supporting documents.
4.  Pay the objection fee.
5.  Submit before **10th April 2026**.

Don't miss the deadline to review and object to the answer key!

    *   Gen/EWS/Freedom Fighter/Sports: Rs 1000
    *   SC/BC/EWS: Rs 250
    *   Ex-Servicemen & Dependent: Rs 200
*   **Important Dates:**
    *   Notification Release: 28-03-2026
    *   Apply Online Start: 01-04-2026
    *   Apply Online Last: 21-04-2026
*   **Salary:** Rs 19900 - Rs 63200 (L-2)
*   **Selection Process:** Written Exam (Part A - Punjabi Qualifying, Part B - Merit based), PMT & PET, Document Verification.
*   **Physical Standards:**
    *   **Warder (Male):** Height - 5'7" (5'4.5" for Dogras & Gurkhas), Chest - 33" (unexpanded), 34.5" (expanded)
    *   **Matron (Female):** Height - 5'3", Weight - 50kg and above
*   **Physical Test:** Details available in the notification.

**Don't miss this opportunity!** Read the full notification before applying.

website_content.title: NIELIT DLC Exams Postponed
website_content.markdown_content:
## NIELIT DLC Exams Postponed - April 2026 Cycle

The National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology (NIELIT) has postponed the Digital Literacy Course (DLC) examinations for January, February, and March 2026 cycles due to administrative reasons.

**Key Details:**

*   **Affected Courses:** CCC, CCCP, ECC, ACC, BCC
*   **Affected Cycles:** January 2026, February 2026, March 2026
*   **New Exam Cycle:** April 2026 (Consolidated)
*   **Admit Card Release:** To be released later with the April 2026 cycle.
*   **Official Portal:** [student.nielit.gov.in](student.nielit.gov.in)

All registered candidates will be automatically shifted to the April 2026 exam cycle. No new registration is required.  The revised schedule and admit cards will be published shortly on the official NIELIT student portal. Candidates are advised to regularly check the portal for updates.

**Admit Card Details (when released):**

*   Candidate’s name and photograph
*   Roll number / registration number
*   Exam date and time slot
*   Examination centre address
*   Course name
*   Reporting time and exam-day instructions
*   Signature / authority stamp

website_content.title: JSSC Excise Constable 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## JSSC Excise Constable Admit Card 2026

The Jharkhand Staff Selection Commission (JSSC) will release the admit card for the Excise Constable (JECCE-2023) exam on **April 9, 2026**. Candidates who qualified the Physical Efficiency Test (PET) can download their hall ticket from [jssc.nic.in](https://jssc.nic.in) or [jssc.jharkhand.gov.in](https://jssc.jharkhand.gov.in).

**Key Details:**

*   **Release Date:** April 9, 2026
*   **Exam Date:** April 12, 2026
*   **Total Vacancies:** 583 Posts
*   **Exam Mode:** Offline (OMR Pen & Paper Based)
*   **Advertisement No.:** 06/2023

**Important Dates:**

*   Application Start Date: June 1, 2023 (Completed)
*   Application Last Date: July 10, 2023 (Completed)
*   PET Exam Dates: August 22, 2024 - September 4, 2024 (Completed)
*   PET Result: November 28, 2025 (Declared)

**Documents Required:**

*   Admit Card (printed copy)
*   Valid Photo ID (Aadhaar, Voter ID, Driving License, PAN Card, Passport)
*   Passport-size photographs (2 copies)
*   Black/Blue ballpoint pen

**Important Instructions:**

*   Reach the exam center at least 60 minutes before reporting time.
*   Carry all required documents.
*   Follow invigilator instructions.
*   Use only black/blue ballpoint pen for the OMR sheet.

website_content.title: Delhi Govt School Admission 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## Delhi Government School Admission 2026 (Classes 6-9)

The Directorate of Education (DoE), GNCT of Delhi, has opened online registration for admission to classes 6 to 9 (Non-Plan category) for the academic session 2026-27.

**Key Details:**

*   **Eligibility:** Delhi Residents only.
*   **Classes:** 6, 7, 8, 9 (Non-Plan Category)
*   **Application Mode:** Online via [edudel.nic.in](https://edudel.nic.in)
*   **Age Limit (as of March 31, 2026):**
    *   Class 6: 10-12 years
    *   Class 7: 11-13 years
    *   Class 8: 12-14 years
    *   Class 9: 13-15 years
*   **Important Dates (Cycles):**
    *   **Cycle-I:** Registration (April 1-7, 2026), Allotment (April 21, 2026), Verification (April 22-30, 2026)
    *   **Cycle-II:** Registration (April 30-May 25, 2026), Allotment (June 12, 2026), Verification (June 15-30, 2026)
    *   **Cycle-III:** Registration (July 1-25, 2026), Allotment (August 7, 2026), Verification (August 10-31, 2026)
*   **Manual Admission:** Last date for application - August 17, 2026
*   **Last Date of Admission:** August 31, 2026

**Required Documents:**

*   Passport-size photograph
*   School Leaving Certificate (SLC) or Date of Birth Certificate
*   Marksheet of previous class (if applicable)
*   Delhi Residence Proof (Aadhaar, Ration Card, Voter ID, etc.)
*   Disability Certificate (if applicable)

**Note:** Submit only one application.

website_content.markdown_content:
**SIDBI Recruitment 2026 - Specialized Consultants / Experts**

The Small Industries Development Bank of India (SIDBI) is recruiting for 08 positions of Specialized Consultants / Experts.

**Key Details:**

*   **Total Vacancies:** 08
*   **Application Dates:** 01 April 2026 - 30 April 2026
*   **Application Fee:** No Application Fee
*   **Age Limit:** 35-40 Years (relaxation as per rules)
*   **Qualification:** Any Bachelor's Degree, B.Tech/B.E, Any Post Graduate, CA (Specific requirements vary by position - see full notification)
*   **Selection Process:** Personal Interview
*   **Application Mode:** Email

**Positions Available:**

*   Associate Manager – Finance & Accounting (01)
*   Office Manager (01)
*   Associate Manager – E Mobility (01)
*   Associate Manager – Renewable Energy (01)
*   Associate Manager – Procurement (01)
*   Associate Manager - Monitoring and Evaluation (01)
*   Associate Manager – Environment & Social Safeguard (01)
*   Associate Manager – Climate (01)

**How to Apply:**

1.  Download and fill the prescribed Application Form (Appendix-II).
2.  Attach self-attested scanned copies of all required documents.
3.  Email the completed application to gcfv@sidbi.in, nidhik@sidbi.in, or supriyaminz@sidbi.in with the subject line: “Application for the post of [Post Name]” (Advertisement No.: GCFV/30032026/OUT/72754 dated April 01, 2026).

**Important Date:** Last Date to Apply: 30th April 2026 (up to 23:59 hrs)

website_content.markdown_content:
## IP University CET 2026 Registration Deadline Extended

The Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University (GGSIPU) has extended the online registration window for CET 2026 and other admission programmes.

**Key Details:**

*   **New Last Date to Apply:** 11 April 2026 (11:59 PM)
*   **Previous Last Date:** 31 March 2026
*   **Application Mode:** Online only
*   **Application Fee:** ₹1,500 per programme
*   **CET Exam Dates:** 25 April – 17 May 2026
*   **Official Portal:** [ipu.admissions.nic.in](ipu.admissions.nic.in)

**How to Apply:**

1.  Visit the official admission portal: [ipu.admissions.nic.in](ipu.admissions.nic.in)
2.  Click on 'New Candidate Registration'.
3.  Register with your name, mobile number, and email ID.

website_content.title: RPSC SI Admit Card 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## RPSC SI Admit Card 2026 - Download Now!

The Rajasthan Public Service Commission (RPSC) will release the admit card for the Sub Inspector / Platoon Commander Combined Competitive Examination 2025 on **April 2, 2026**. Candidates can download their hall ticket from the official websites: [rpsc.rajasthan.gov.in](https://rpsc.rajasthan.gov.in) or [sso.rajasthan.gov.in](https://sso.rajasthan.gov.in).

**Key Details:**

*   **Release Date:** April 2, 2026
*   **Exam Dates:** April 5 & 6, 2026 (Two Shifts)
*   **Exam City Slip Release:** March 29, 2026
*   **Total Vacancies:** 1015 Posts
*   **Advertisement No.:** 05/2025
*   **Exam Mode:** Offline (OMR Based)

**Shift Timings:**
* Shift 1: 11:00 AM - 1:00 PM
* Shift 2: 3:00 PM - 5:00 PM

**Important Documents to Carry:**
*   RPSC SI Admit Card 2026 (printed copy)
*   Valid Photo ID Proof (Aadhaar, Voter ID, Driving License, PAN Card, Passport)
*   Recent passport-size photographs

**What Not to Carry:**
*   Mobile phones/smartwatches
*   Calculators/books/notes
*   Bags/Bluetooth devices/earphones

**Download Steps:**

1.  Visit [rpsc.rajasthan.gov.in](https://rpsc.rajasthan.gov.in) or [sso.rajasthan.gov.in](https://sso.rajasthan.gov.in).
2.  Navigate to the “Exam Details” or “Admit Card” section.
3.  Enter Application/Registration Number, Date of Birth, and Captcha Code.
4.  Download and save the PDF.
5.  Take printouts for exam day.

**Important Note:** The Exam City Slip is *not* the admit card. The admit card will contain the complete exam center details.

website_content.markdown_content:
## HPRCA Assistant Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026

The Himachal Pradesh Rajya Chayan Aayog (HPRCA) has released a notification for 312 Assistant Staff Nurse vacancies.

**Key Details:**

*   **Organization:** Himachal Pradesh Rajya Chayan Aayog (HPRCA)
*   **Post Name:** Assistant Staff Nurse
*   **Number of Vacancies:** 312
*   **Salary:** ₹25,000/- per month (fixed honorarium)
*   **Eligibility:** B.Sc. Nursing with 50% marks OR GNMA Grade Nursing Diploma with 50% marks. Must be female, Himachal Bonafide, and registered with HPNRC, Shimla-06.
*   **Age Limit:** 21-32 years (as of 01-01-2026)
*   **Application Fee:** ₹800 (all categories) + ₹100 (correction fee, if applicable)
*   **Start Date:** 12.12.2025 (10:00 AM)
*   **Last Date:** 13.04.2026 (11:59 PM)
*   **Selection Process:** Computer Based Test/Written Screening Test (120 marks, 1.5 hours duration)

**Important Dates:**

*   Notification Date: 06.12.2025
*   Application Start Date: 12.12.2025
*   Application End Date: 13.04.2026
*   Correction Window: Opens after 3 working days from closing date (7 days period)

For detailed information, refer to the official notification.

website_content.markdown_content:
## MAH MBA CET 2026 Admit Card - Release Soon!

The State Common Entrance Test Cell, Maharashtra will soon release the admit card for the MAH MBA/MMS CET 2026 exam. Registered candidates can download their hall ticket from the official website: [cetcell.mahacet.org](https://cetcell.mahacet.org).

**Key Highlights:**

| Particular | Details |
|---|---| 
| Exam name | MAH MBA/MMS CET 2026 |
| Conducting authority | State Common Entrance Test Cell, Maharashtra |
| Course | MBA / MMS |
| Admit card status | To be released soon |
| Mode of admit card | Online only (download and print) |
| Official website | [Click Here](https://cetcell.mahacet.org) |
| Login mode | MAH MBA/MMS CET 2026 candidate login |
| Exam mode | As per official information brochure |

**Important Dates:**

*   Release Date: April 2, 2026
*   Exam Dates: April 6, 7, 8, 2026, and May 9, 2026

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit [cetcell.mahacet.org](https://cetcell.mahacet.org).
2.  Navigate to the MAH MBA/MMS CET 2026 section.
3.  Click on the Admit Card/Hall Ticket or candidate login link.
4.  Login with your credentials.
5.  Download the admit card in PDF format.

**Details on Admit Card:**

*   Candidate’s name, photograph, and signature
*   Application number and roll number
*   Exam date, reporting time, and shift
*   Exam center details
*   Category, gender, and other personal details
*   Exam day instructions

**Important Note:** Verify all details on the admit card. Contact the helpdesk for any discrepancies.

**Eligibility:** Only candidates who have successfully completed the application process and paid the fee can download the admit card.

**Troubleshooting:**

*   **Wrong Credentials:** Use the 'Forgot Password' option.
*   **Application Not Accepted:** Check your application status.
*   **Server Issues:** Try again later.

**Documents Required:**

*   Printed admit card
*   Valid photo ID (Aadhaar, PAN, Passport, etc.)

**Exam Day Guidelines:**

*   Reach the center before reporting time.
*   Do not carry prohibited items.
*   Follow invigilator instructions.

website_content.title: KEAM 2026 Admit Card Released
website_content.markdown_content:
## KEAM Admit Card 2026 (Out Today)

The Commissioner for Entrance Examinations (CEE), Kerala has released the KEAM 2026 admit card today. Candidates can download their hall ticket from the official CEE Kerala website.

**Key Highlights:**

| Particular | Details |
|---|---| 
| Exam name | Kerala Engineering Architecture Medical (KEAM) 2026 |
| Conducting authority | Commissioner for Entrance Examinations (CEE), Kerala |
| KEAM admit card 2026 date | 1 April 2026 |
| KEAM 2026 exam window | 17 to 23 April 2026 (with buffer dates) |
| Courses covered | Engineering and Pharmacy |

**How to Download KEAM Admit Card 2026?**

1. Go to the official website of CEE Kerala: [Click Here](https://cee.kerala.gov.in)
2. Click on the **KEAM 2026 - Candidate Portal** link.
3. Enter your KEAM **application number** and **password** in the login window.
4. Find and click on the **KEAM Admit Card 2026 / Hall Ticket** link on the dashboard.
5. Download or Print the admit card as a PDF.

**Details Mentioned on KEAM Admit Card 2026:**

*   Candidate’s name, photograph, and signature.
*   KEAM 2026 application number and roll number.
*   Exam date, reporting time, and exam shift.
*   Exam centre name, full address, and centre code.
*   Course opted (Engineering / Pharmacy) and paper details.
*   Important exam day instructions.

**Important Dates:**

| Event | Date / Duration |
|---|---| 
| KEAM admit card 2026 release | 1 April 2026 |
| KEAM 2026 exam window | 17 to 23 April 2026 (with buffer dates) |

**Eligibility:**

Only eligible and accepted applications can access the hall ticket. Check your application status in the candidate portal if you face any issues.

**What to do if you cannot download?**

*   Double-check login credentials.
*   Check for application defects.
*   Try again later or use a different browser.
*   Contact CEE Kerala for assistance.

**Exam Day Guidelines:**

*   Carry a printed copy of the admit card.
*   Carry a valid photo ID.
*   Reach the exam centre well before reporting time.

website_content.title: AIIMS INI-CET July 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## AIIMS INI-CET July 2026 Registration

**Registration Start Date:** 28 March 2026
**Last Date to Apply:** 25 April 2026 (5:00 PM)
**Exam Date:** 16 May 2026 (Saturday)
**Official Website:** [aiimsexams.ac.in](aiimsexams.ac.in)

**Overview:**

The All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), New Delhi, is conducting the INI-CET July 2026 session for admission to postgraduate medical courses including MD, MS, MDS, DM (6 years), MCh (6 years), and MD (Hospital Administration).

**Important Dates:**

*   Online Registration Starts: 28 March 2026
*   Last Date for Online Registration: 25 April 2026 (5:00 PM)
*   Status of Registration & Image Correction: 30 April – 02 May 2026
*   Admit Card Release Date: 09 May 2026
*   Exam Date: 16 May 2026
*   Result Declaration (Expected): 23 May 2026
*   Course Commencement: 01 July 2026

**Application Fee:**

*   General / OBC / Foreign National / Sponsored: ₹4000
*   SC / ST / EWS: ₹3200
*   PwBD: Exempted

**Eligibility Criteria:**

*   MBBS/BDS degree as per course requirements.
*   Internship completion on or before 31 July 2026.
*   Minimum marks: 55% aggregate (General/OBC/EWS/Foreign) and 50% for SC/ST.

**Exam Pattern:**

*   Mode: Computer-Based Test (CBT)
*   Duration: 3 hours
*   Total Questions: 200
*   Marking: +1 for correct, -1/3 for incorrect

## ESIC Ranchi Recruitment 2026 - Teaching Faculty

The Employees State Insurance Corporation (ESIC Ranchi) has released a recruitment notification for **78 posts** of Teaching Faculty.

**Important Dates:**
*   **Application Start:** 30 March 2026
*   **Application Last Date:** 09 April 2026
*   **Interview Date:** Third week of April 2026 (Tentative)

**Vacancy Details:**
*   Professor: 10
*   Associate Professor: 17
*   Assistant Professor: 09
*   Senior Resident: 42

**Eligibility:**
*   MBBS / MD / MS / DNB as per NMC guidelines.
*   **Age Limit:**
    *   Professor / Associate Professor / Assistant Professor: Not exceeding 69 Years
    *   Senior Resident: 45 Years (50 Years for pre-clinical / para-clinical departments)

Selection will be based on Interview. Shortlisting will be based on academic credentials, experience, and documents submitted.

For more details, refer to the official notification.

website_content.title: Karnataka 2nd PUC Result 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## Karnataka 2nd PUC Result 2026

The Karnataka School Examination and Assessment Board (KSEAB) is expected to release the 2nd PUC Result 2026 in the first or second week of April 2026. Students who appeared for Exam 1 from February 28 to March 17, 2026, can check their results online.

**Key Details:**

*   **Board:** Karnataka School Examination and Assessment Board (KSEAB)
*   **Exam Name:** Karnataka 2nd PUC Exam 1 2026
*   **Expected Release Date:** First or Second Week of April 2026 (potentially around April 7-10, 2026, at 11:00 AM)
*   **Official Websites:** [karresults.nic.in](karresults.nic.in), [kseab.karnataka.gov.in](kseab.karnataka.gov.in)
*   **Streams:** Science, Commerce, Arts
*   **Supplementary Exam Dates:** April 25 to Early May 2026 (Tentative)

**How to Check Your Result:**

1.  Visit either [karresults.nic.in](karresults.nic.in) or [kseab.karnataka.gov.in](kseab.karnataka.gov.in).
2.  Click on the link for “Karnataka 2nd PUC Result 2026” or “II PUC Result 2026”.
3.  Enter your Registration Number and Date of Birth (or select stream if required).
4.  Click on Submit/View Result.
5.  Download and print your provisional marksheet.

**Previous Year Trends (2025):**

*   Result Date: April 8, 2025
*   Overall Pass Percentage: 73-81% (varies by stream)
*   Girls generally outperformed boys.
*   Science stream had the highest pass percentage.

*   **Exam Mode:** Offline (Written Objective)
*   **Total Vacancies:** 935 Posts

1.  Visit the official BPSC website: bpsc.bihar.gov.in
2.  Navigate to the "Admit Card" or "Latest Announcements" section.
3.  Click on the "BPSC AEDO Admit Card 2026" link (when available).
4.  Enter your Username/Registration Number and Password.
5.  Upload a recent passport-size photograph (25kb in JPG format) if required.
6.  Download and print the admit card.

*   Admit Card (printed copy)
*   Valid Photo ID Proof (Aadhaar, Voter ID, Driving License, PAN Card, Passport)
*   Passport-size photographs (2 copies)

**Important Instructions:**

*   Check all details on the admit card immediately after download.
*   Report any discrepancies to the BPSC helpdesk within 24 hours.
*   Reach the exam center 45-60 minutes before reporting time.

website_content.title: UPTET 2026 Notification
website_content.markdown_content:
## Uttar Pradesh Teacher Eligibility Test (UPTET) 2026

The Uttar Pradesh Education Service Selection Commission (UPESSC), Prayagraj has released the notification for UPTET 2026 (Advt. No. 01/UPTET/2026) for the 2025-26 session.

**Key Details:**

*   **Exam Name:** Uttar Pradesh Teacher Eligibility Test (UPTET) 2026
*   **Conducting Authority:** Uttar Pradesh Education Service Selection Commission (UPESSC), Prayagraj
*   **Session:** 2025-26
*   **Exam Levels:** Primary Level (Class 1-5) & Upper Primary Level (Class 6-8)
*   **Application Mode:** Online only via [uptet.upessc.org](uptet.upessc.org)
*   **Exam Dates:** July 2nd, 3rd, & 4th, 2026
*   **Exam Mode:** Offline (OMR-based, MCQ)

**Important Dates:**

*   **Notification Publication:** March 20, 2026
*   **Registration Start:** March 27, 2026
*   **Registration Last Date:** April 26, 2026
*   **Fee Payment Last Date:** April 26, 2026
*   **Exam District Intimation:** June 22, 2026
*   **Exam Dates:** July 2, 3, 4, 2026

**Application Fee:**

| Category                     | Single Paper | Both Papers | 
| ---------------------------- | ------------ | ----------- |
| General / OBC / EWS          | ₹1000        | ₹1200-2000  |
| SC / ST                      | ₹500         | ₹800-1000   |
| Differently Abled Candidates | ₹300         | ₹200-500    |

**Eligibility:**

*   **Primary (Class 1-5):** Graduation + 2-year D.El.Ed/B.T.C/B.El.Ed/D.Ed (Special Education) or equivalent.
*   **Upper Primary (Class 6-8):** Graduation + 2-year D.El.Ed/B.Ed or equivalent.

**Exam Pattern:**

*   **Paper I (Class 1-5):** 150 MCQs (Child Development, Language I, Language II, Maths, Environmental Studies) - 150 Marks
*   **Paper II (Class 6-8):** 150 MCQs (Child Development, Language I, Language II, Maths & Science/Social Studies) - 150 Marks

**Certificate Validity:** Lifetime (from result declaration date).

For detailed information, refer to the official notification and information booklet.

*   **Exam Date:** 15th March 2026
*   **Result Date:** 2nd April 2026
*   **Papers:** Paper 1 (Classes 1-5) & Paper 2 (Classes 6-8)

*   **General Category:** 60% (90/150)
*   **Reserved Categories (SC/ST/OBC):** 55% (82.5/150)

Qualified candidates can download their eligibility certificate from the official portal. A short correction window may open for minor errors.

website_content.title: RRB NTPC Graduate Level Answer Key 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## RRB NTPC Graduate Level Answer Key 2026

The Railway Recruitment Board (RRB) is expected to release the RRB NTPC Graduate Level Answer Key 2026 (CEN 06/2025). Candidates who appeared for the examination held from **16th to 27th March 2026** can download the provisional answer key from the official regional RRB websites (e.g., [www.rrbcdg.gov.in](www.rrbcdg.gov.in)).

**Key Details:**

*   **Total Vacancies:** 5810
*   **Exam Date:** 16th - 27th March 2026
*   **Answer Key Release Date:** 1st week of April 2026 (Expected)
*   **Objection Fee:** ₹50 per question (refundable if accepted)
*   **Result Declaration:** May/June 2026 (Expected)

**Important Dates:**

*   Exam Conducted: 16th to 27th March 2026
*   Provisional Answer Key Released: 1st week of April 2026 (Expected)
*   Last Date to Raise Objection: To be notified
*   Final Answer Key: After objection review

**Marking Scheme:**

*   Correct Answer: +1 mark
*   Wrong Answer: -1/3 mark
*   Unattempted: 0 marks

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit the official RRB website ([www.rrbcdg.gov.in](www.rrbcdg.gov.in) or your respective RRB portal).
2.  Navigate to the "CEN 06/2025 (NTPC-Graduate)" or "Answer Key" section.
3.  Click on the "Tentative CBT 1 Graduate Level Answer Key & Response Sheet" link.
4.  Login using your Registration Number/Username and Password/Date of Birth.
5.  Download and save the PDF/response sheet.

## SSC CHSL Tier 2 City Intimation Slip 2026 Released!

The Staff Selection Commission (SSC) has released the City Intimation Slip for Tier 2 of the Combined Higher Secondary Level Examination 2025 (CHSL) on **April 1st, 2026**. 

**Key Details:**

*   **Release Date:** April 1st, 2026
*   **Tier-2 Exam Date:** April 10th, 2026 (Computer Based Test)
*   **Admit Card Release Date:** April 7th, 2026
*   **Posts:** Lower Divisional Clerk (LDC)/Junior Secretariat Assistant (JSA), Postal Assistant/Sorting Assistant (PA/SA), Data Entry Operator (DEO) etc.
*   **Qualified Candidates:** Approximately 39,901 (from Tier-1)
*   **Exam Mode:** Online CBT (Objective + Skill Test / Typing Test component)

**Important Note:** This is *not* the admit card. The admit card will be released on April 7th, 2026.  You *cannot* enter the exam hall with only the city intimation slip. A valid photo ID is also required.

## Tamil Nadu SSLC Social Science Answer Key 2026

The Directorate of Government Examinations (DGE), Tamil Nadu conducted the SSLC (Class 10) Social Science exam on **April 2, 2026**, from **10:00 AM to 1:15 PM**. 

**Key Details:**

*   **Conducting Board:** Directorate of Government Examinations (DGE), Tamil Nadu
*   **Exam Name:** Tamil Nadu SSLC Social Science 2026
*   **Exam Date:** April 2, 2026
*   **Exam Time:** 10:00 AM - 1:15 PM
*   **Total Marks:** 100 (80 Theory + 20 Internal Assessment)
*   **Unofficial Answer Key:** Available after 1:15 PM (April 2, 2026)
*   **Official Answer Key:** Released by DGE Tamil Nadu (Tentative - April 2026)

**Marks Distribution (Theory - 80 Marks):**

*   History: 20 Marks
*   Geography: 20 Marks
*   Civics: 20 Marks
*   Economics: 20 Marks

**Important Note:** A minimum of 30% is required in the theory paper to qualify.

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit the official DGE Tamil Nadu website or a trusted education portal.
2.  Look for the Tamil Nadu SSLC Answer Key 2026 link.
3.  Click the link and select Social Science.
4.  Download the PDF and cross-check your answers.

website_content.title: UP CNET 2026 Notification
website_content.markdown_content:
# UP CNET 2026 Notification

Atal Bihari Vajpayee Medical University (ABVMU), Uttar Pradesh has released the official notification for the Uttar Pradesh Common Nursing Entrance Test (UP CNET) 2026.

**Important Dates:**

*   **Notification Release:** 28 March 2026
*   **Application Start Date:** 28 March 2026
*   **Last Date to Apply:** 20 May 2026 (11:59 PM)
*   **Application Correction Window:** 13 May – 20 May 2026
*   **Admit Card Release:** 30 May 2026 (Tentative)
*   **Exam Date:** 06 June 2026 (11:00 AM - 2:20 PM)
*   **Result Declaration:** 2nd Week of June 2026

**Courses Offered:**

*   B.Sc. Nursing (4-year)
*   Post Basic B.Sc. Nursing (2-year)
*   M.Sc. Nursing / NPCC (2-year)

**Eligibility Criteria:**

*   **Age Limit:** Minimum 17 years as of 31 December 2026.
*   **B.Sc. Nursing:** 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry, Biology & English (45% aggregate, 40% for SC/ST/OBC).
*   **Post Basic B.Sc. Nursing:** 10+2 + GNM certificate.
*   **M.Sc. Nursing / NPCC:** B.Sc./Post Basic B.Sc. Nursing (55% marks) + 1 year work experience.

**Application Fee:**

*   UR / OBC: ₹3000
*   SC / ST / PwD: ₹2000

**Exam Pattern:**

*   **Mode:** Offline (OMR-based)
*   **Duration:** 140 minutes
*   **Total Questions:** 120 MCQs
*   **Marking Scheme:** +1 for correct answer, no negative marking.
*   **Medium:** English & Hindi (B.Sc.), English only (Post Basic & M.Sc.)

website_content.title: Odisha Teacher Eligibility Test (OTET) 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## Odisha Teacher Eligibility Test (OTET) 2026

The Board of Secondary Education (BSE), Odisha, is conducting the OTET 2026 for teaching posts in Classes 1-5 (Paper I) and Classes 6-8 (Paper II) in government schools across Odisha.

**Important Dates:**

*   **Notification Release:** 23 March 2026
*   **Application Start:** 26 March 2026
*   **Application End:** 9 April 2026 (11:45 PM)
*   **Fee Payment End:** 9 April 2026 (11:45 PM)
*   **Admit Card Release:** 15 May 2026
*   **Exam Date:** 29 May 2026

**Eligibility Criteria:**

*   **Paper I (Classes 1-5):** Higher Secondary (+2) with 50% marks (45% for reserved categories), D.El.Ed/CT/B.El.Ed/Diploma in Special Education.
*   **Paper II (Classes 6-8):** Graduation with 50% marks (45% for reserved categories), B.Ed/D.El.Ed/B.A.Ed/B.Sc.Ed.
*   **Age:** Minimum 21 years (no upper age limit).
*   **Residency:** Permanent resident of Odisha.

**Application Fee:**

*   UR/SEBC: ₹500
*   SC/ST: ₹300

**Application Process:**

1.  Visit the official website: bseodisha.ac.in
2.  Complete the online application form.
3.  Upload required documents.
4.  Pay the application fee online.
5.  Submit and download the confirmation page.

**Note:** Apply early to avoid server issues.

website_content.title: Telangana District Court Typing Test 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## Telangana District Court Typing Test 2026

The Telangana High Court (TSHC) will release the hall ticket for the Typing Test today, April 2nd, 2026. This test is for candidates who applied for the Typist and Copyist posts.

**Key Details:**

*   **Conducting Body:** Telangana High Court (TSHC)
*   **Posts:** Typist & Copyist
*   **Vacancies:** Typist (42), Copyist (64)
*   **Hall Ticket Release Date:** April 2nd, 2026
*   **Typing Test Date:** April 10th, 2026
*   **Exam Mode:** English Typing Test (Computer Based)
*   **Duration:** 10 minutes
*   **Required Speed:** 45 Words Per Minute
*   **Qualifying Marks:**
    *   OC / EWS: 40%
    *   BC: 35%
    *   SC / ST / PH: 30%

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit [https://tshc.gov.in](https://tshc.gov.in)
2.  Navigate to the “Recruitment” section.
3.  Find and click the link for “Recruitment – Typist & Copyist – Link to Download Telangana District Court Typing Test Hall Ticket 2026”.
4.  Enter Registration Number, Date of Birth, and Captcha Code.
5.  Download and print the hall ticket (2-3 copies).

**Documents Required:**

*   Printed Hall Ticket
*   Valid Photo ID (Aadhaar, Voter ID, PAN, Passport, Driving License)
*   2 Recent Passport Size Photographs

**Important Note:** Mobile phones, calculators, and other electronic devices are not allowed.

## JSSC ANM Answer Key 2026 Released!

The Jharkhand Staff Selection Commission (JSSC) has released the provisional answer key for the Auxiliary Nurse Midwifery (ANM) examination held on **18 & 19 March 2026**. 

**Key Details:**

*   **Organization:** Jharkhand Staff Selection Commission (JSSC)
*   **Post Name:** Auxiliary Nurse Midwifery (ANM) / Female Health Worker
*   **Total Vacancies:** 3181 (Regular: 3020 + Backlog: 161)
*   **Answer Key Status:** Released on **01 April 2026**
*   **Objection Deadline:** **07 April 2026**

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit the official website: [https://jssc.jharkhand.gov.in](https://jssc.jharkhand.gov.in)
2.  Navigate to the "Notices" or "Answer Key" section.
3.  Click on the relevant link.
4.  Login with your Registration Number and Password/Date of Birth.

**How to Raise an Objection:**

1.  Login to your candidate portal.
2.  Go to the "Challenge/Objection" section.
3.  Select the question(s) and upload supporting documents (if any).
4.  Pay the objection fee (if applicable).
5.  Submit before **07 April 2026**.

**Important Dates:**

*   Exam Date: 18 & 19 March 2026
*   Answer Key Release Date: 01 April 2026
*   Objection Deadline: 07 April 2026

**Scoring:**

Total Score = (Correct Answers × Marks per Question) – (Wrong Answers × Negative Marking)

website_content.title: RUHS BSc Nursing 2026 Application
website_content.markdown_content:
## RUHS BSc Nursing Application Form 2026

The application process for the RUHS BSc Nursing program 2026 is now open! Here's a quick overview:

**Important Dates:**

*   Application Start Date: 1 April 2026
*   Application Last Date: 21 April 2026
*   Application Correction Window: 29 April – 1 May 2026
*   Admit Card Release: 15 May 2026
*   Exam Date: 21 May 2026

**Eligibility Criteria:**

*   Educational Qualification: 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry, Biology & English (45% marks, 40% for SC/ST/OBC)
*   Age Limit: Minimum 17 years as of 31 December 2026
*   Nationality: Indian Citizen

**Application Fee:**

*   UR / OBC / EWS: ₹2000
*   SC / ST: ₹1000

**How to Apply:**

1.  Visit the official website.
2.  Register with basic details.
3.  Login and fill the application form.
4.  Upload required documents (photo, signature, mark sheets, certificates).
5.  Pay the application fee online.
6.  Submit and download the confirmation page.

**Exam Pattern:**

*   Mode: Offline (OMR-based)
*   Type: Multiple Choice Questions (MCQs)
*   Subjects: Physics, Chemistry, Biology, English
*   Duration: 2 Hours

**Syllabus:** Based on Class 12 NCERT curriculum.

website_content.markdown_content:
## MPESB Recruitment 2026 - Nursing Officer & Sister Tutor

The Madhya Pradesh Employee Selection Board (MPESB) has announced a recruitment notification for **2317** posts of Nursing Officer and Sister Tutor.

**Key Details:**

*   **Total Vacancies:** 2317 (Nursing Officer: 2099, Sister Tutor: 218)
*   **Starting Date:** 06-04-2026
*   **Last Date to Apply:** 20-04-2026
*   **Correction Date:** 25-04-2026
*   **Tentative Exam Date:** 15-05-2026 onwards
*   **Age Limit:** 18-40 years (Relaxation applicable as per MP Govt. rules)
*   **Application Fee:**
    *   General/Unreserved: Rs 500/- + Rs 60 (Kiosk) / Rs 20 (Login User)
    *   SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwD (MP Domicile): Rs 250/- + Rs 60 (Kiosk) / Rs 20 (Login User)
*   **Qualification:**
    *   Nursing Officer: B.Sc. Nursing / Post Basic B.Sc. Nursing with 45% marks + MP Nursing Council Registration
    *   Sister Tutor: B.Sc. Nursing / Post Basic B.Sc. Nursing with 1 year experience
*   **Selection Process:** Online Computer Based Test (CBT)
*   **Exam Pattern:** Total 100 Questions, 100 Marks, 2 Hours (Part-A: 25 Marks, Part-B: 75 Marks)
*   **Important Note:** Aadhaar registration is mandatory.

For more details and to apply, visit the official website.

website_content.markdown_content:
## Indian Air Force Airmen Group Y Medical Assistant Intake 01/2027 Answer Key 2026

The Indian Air Force (IAF) has released the provisional answer key and recorded responses for the Airmen Group Y (Medical Assistant) examination held on **30-31 March 2026**. 

**Key Details:**

*   **Organization:** Indian Air Force (IAF) / Central Airmen Selection Board (CASB)
*   **Post Name:** Airmen Group Y Medical Assistant (Intake 01/2027)
*   **Exam Date:** 30-31 March 2026
*   **Answer Key Status:** Released (Provisional / Recorded Responses)
*   **Release Date:** 03 April 2026
*   **Official Websites:** [airmenselection.cdac.in](airmenselection.cdac.in) / [indianairforce.nic.in](indianairforce.nic.in)

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit the official portal: airmenselection.cdac.in or indianairforce.nic.in
2.  Go to the Candidate Login section.
3.  Log in using your Enrollment Number / Registration Number and Password / Date of Birth.
4.  Navigate to the Answer Key or Response Sheet tab.
5.  Download and save the PDF / details.

**Objection Process:**

*   Log in to the candidate portal.
*   Go to the “Challenge Answer Key” or “Objection” section.
*   Select the question(s) to challenge.
*   Provide justification/supporting documents (if required).
*   Pay the objection fee (if applicable).
*   Submit before the deadline.

**Important Dates:**

*   Exam Conducted: 30-31 March 2026
*   Provisional Answer Key Released: 03 April 2026
*   Final Answer Key (Expected): Mid-April 2026
*   Result Declaration (Expected): May 2026

**Marking Scheme:**

*   Correct Answer: +1 mark
*   Wrong Answer: -0.25 mark (negative marking)
*   Unattempted: 0 marks

website_content.markdown_content:
## Delhi State Health Mission (DSHM) Recruitment 2026

DSHM has announced a recruitment notification for **116 posts** of Pathologist, Lab Technician, and more.

**Important Dates:**
*   **Start Date:** 03-04-2026
*   **Last Date:** 17-04-2026 (till 05:00 PM)

**Vacancy Details:**
*   Pathologist: 04 Posts
*   Microbiologist: 05 Posts
*   Biochemist: 07 Posts
*   Lab Technician: 100 Posts

**Eligibility Criteria:**
*   **Pathologist:** MBBS with PG Degree/Diploma + DMC Registration
*   **Microbiologist:** Ph.D./M.Sc. Microbiology + Experience
*   **Biochemist:** MBBS with PG Degree/Diploma + DMC Registration
*   **Lab Technician:** B.Sc. (MLT) OR 10+2 + Diploma (MLT) + 3 years experience

*   Exam Conducted: January 12 - January 20, 2026
*   Provisional Answer Key Released: January 23, 2026
*   Last Date to Raise Objection: January 29, 2026

*   **Organization:** Telangana State Level Police Recruitment Board (TSLPRB) / Telangana Police

1.  Visit [tgprb.in](tgprb.in).
2.  Navigate to the "Supervisor Trainees Recruitment 2025-26 in TGSRTC" or "Answer Key" section.
3.  Click on the respective link for TST or MST.

**How to Raise Objections:**

*   Unattempted: 0 marks
*   Deleted Questions (D*): Marks awarded proportionally.

**Important Dates:**
*   Application Start Date: 01 April 2026
*   Application Last Date: 05 May 2026
*   Roll Number Release Date: 11 May 2026 onwards
*   Exam Date: 17 May 2026 (10:00 AM - 1:00 PM)
*   Result Date: 25 May 2026

**Eligibility:**
*   Passed Class 10th with at least 35% marks.
*   Appearing candidates in 2026 are also eligible.

**Application Fee:**
*   General Category: Rs. 750
*   SC/ST/OBC Category: Rs. 500

**Exam Pattern:**
*   Total Questions: 150
*   Subjects: Mathematics (50), Physics (50), Chemistry (30), English (20)

4.  Fill the application form, upload documents, and pay the fee.

**Helpline:** 1800-180-8025

website_content.title: MP PAT Syllabus 2026 Released
website_content.markdown_content:
## MP PAT Syllabus 2026

The Madhya Pradesh Employees Selection Board (MPESB) has released the detailed syllabus for the MP PAT Exam 2026. Candidates preparing for the MP PAT recruitment can download the official syllabus PDF, exam pattern, and marking scheme.

**Exam Overview:**

*   **Exam Name:** MP PAT Exam 2026
*   **Conducting Body:** Madhya Pradesh Employees Selection Board (MPESB)
*   **Post Name:** Pre-Agriculture Test (for B.Sc. (Hons.) Agriculture, Horticulture, Forestry, B.Tech Agriculture Engineering etc.)
*   **Exam Mode:** Offline (OMR-based) / Online
*   **Exam Type:** Objective (MCQ)
*   **Total Questions:** 200
*   **Total Marks:** 200
*   **Exam Duration:** 3 Hours
*   **Negative Marking:** No
*   **Selection Process:** Written Exam
*   **Exam Language:** English & Hindi

**Exam Pattern:**

| Subject/Section | No. of Questions | Marks | Duration |
|---|---|---|---|
| Physics + Chemistry + Mathematics (PCM Group) | 50 + 50 + 100 | 200 | 3 Hours |
| Physics + Chemistry + Biology (PCB Group) | 50 + 50 + 100 | 200 | 3 Hours |
| Agriculture-I + Agriculture-II & III (AG Group) | 100 + 100 | 200 | 3 Hours |
| Physics + Chemistry + Agriculture (PCA Group) | 50 + 50 + 100 | 200 | 3 Hours |
| Biology + Chemistry + Agriculture | 50 + 50 + 100 | 200 | 3 Hours |

**Key Highlights:**
* Each correct answer carries 1 mark.
* No negative marking.
* Question paper available in English & Hindi.

**Download the Syllabus:**
[Click Here to Download MP PAT Syllabus PDF 2026](https://esb.mp.gov.in)

**Overview:**

The Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Services Selection Commission (UPSSSC) has announced the Combined Lower Subordinate Services (Graduate Level) Main Examination 2026 for Group C level posts.

**Post Names:**

*   Auditor
*   Assistant Treasury Accountant
*   Clerk cum Typist
*   Executive Officer
*   Amin
*   Assistant Excise Officer, etc.

**Selection Process:**

PET Shortlisting + Main Written Exam + Document Verification

**Exam Mode:**

Offline (OMR-based) / Objective MCQs

**Negative Marking:**

0.25 marks (1/4th) per wrong answer

**Exam Pattern:**

The Main Examination consists of 100 objective-type questions carrying 100 marks, with a duration of 2 hours.

website_content.title: Gujarat RTE Admission 2026-27
website_content.markdown_content:
## Gujarat RTE Admission 2026-27

The Right to Education (RTE) admission process for Class 1 in Gujarat has begun for the 2026-27 academic session.

**Important Dates:**

*   **Online Form Start Date:** April 4, 2026
*   **Last Date to Submit Form:** April 17, 2026 (till midnight)

**Eligibility:**

*   Admission is for Class 1 under the RTE quota.
*   Child must have completed the required age as of June 1, 2026.
*   Family must meet the scheme’s income and category rules.

**Documents Required:**

*   Proof of Date of Birth (Birth Certificate or School Record)
*   Proof of Residence (Aadhar Card, Electricity Bill, Ration Card)
*   Caste/Category Certificate (if applicable)
*   Income Certificate
*   Income Tax Return document or Self-Declaration

**How to Apply:**

1.  Visit the official RTE Gujarat portal.
2.  Read the eligibility criteria and guidelines.
3.  Fill in accurate details.
4.  Upload required documents.
5.  Submit the form and download/print the confirmation copy.

**Note:** The printed form does not need to be submitted physically. Ensure all details are correct before submission.
