## DSSSB 02/24 Drawing Teacher Result 2026 OUT!

The Delhi Subordinate Services Selection Board (DSSSB) has released the result for the Drawing Teacher posts (Post Code 811/24) on **02 April 2026**. Candidates who appeared in the written examination on **28-29 August 2025** can now check their marks and e-dossier status.

**Key Details:**

*   **Recruiting Body:** Delhi Subordinate Services Selection Board (DSSSB)
*   **Post Name:** Drawing Teacher (Post Code 811/24)
*   **Result Type:** Written Examination Result & Marks / e-Dossier Calling
*   **Result Declaration Date:** 02 April 2026
*   **Exam Date:** 28-29 August 2025
*   **Total Vacancies:** 527 (UR: 196, OBC: 164, SC: 45, ST: 64, EWS: 58)

**Selection Stages:**

1.  Written Test
2.  Document Verification (e-Dossier)
3.  Medical Examination

**How to Check:**

1.  Visit the official website: dsssb.delhi.gov.in
2.  Go to the “Latest Result” or “Results” section.
3.  Find and click on NOTICE NO. 1608.
4.  Download the PDF notice.
5.  For individual marks, login at dsssbonline.nic.in using your registration number and password.

**Important Instructions:**

*   Download and save your result and marks.
*   Upload your e-Dossier documents within the given timeline.
*   Keep original documents ready for verification.
*   Check the official website regularly for updates.

website_content.markdown_content:
## RBI Assistant Prelims Admit Card 2026 OUT!

The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has released the admit card for the Preliminary Examination (Panel Year 2025) on **April 2, 2026**. Candidates can download their hall tickets from the official websites: [opportunities.rbi.org.in](opportunities.rbi.org.in) or the IBPS portal.

**Important Dates:**

*   **Admit Card Release Date:** April 2, 2026
*   **Prelims Exam Date:** April 11 & 13, 2026
*   **Mains Exam Date:** June 7, 2026 (Tentative)

**Total Vacancies:** 650 Posts

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit [www.rbi.org.in](www.rbi.org.in) or [opportunities.rbi.org.in](opportunities.rbi.org.in).
2.  Navigate to the “Opportunities at RBI” or “Current Vacancies” section.
3.  Click on “Call Letters” or “Recruitment for the Post of Assistant – Panel Year 2025”.
4.  Enter your Registration Number/Roll Number, Password/Date of Birth, and Captcha Code.
5.  Download and print the admit card on an A4 sheet.

**Documents Required:**

*   Admit Card (printed copy)
*   Valid Photo ID Proof (Aadhaar, PAN, Passport, Driving License, Voter’s ID, Bank Passbook with Photograph, Employee/College ID)

**Prohibited Items:** Mobile phones, smartwatches, calculators, books, notes, bags, purses, wallets.

**Important Note:** Check all details on your admit card immediately after download. Report any discrepancies to the RBI helpdesk.

website_content.markdown_content:
## NHM Haryana Specialist Recruitment 2026

**Notification Date:** 04 April 2026
**Total Vacancies:** 195
**Organization:** National Health Mission (NHM) Haryana
**Post Names:** Gynecologist, Pediatrician, Medicine Specialist, Anesthetist
**Essential Qualification:** MD / Diploma / DNB in relevant specialty + Permanent MCI/NMC Registration
**Application Mode:** Online - nhmharyana.gov.in
**Application Fee:** Not mentioned
**Interview Mode:** Video Conferencing (VC) – Every Wednesday, 12:00 PM to 2:00 PM
**Document Verification:** Every Thursday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM at office of concerned Civil Surgeon
**Initial Appointment Valid Till:** 31 March 2027

**Key Details:**
*   Contractual position (initial appointment till 31-03-2027).
*   Candidates must indicate their district preference at least one day prior to the VC interview.
*   No private practice allowed during employment.
*   Candidates must join within 30 days of offer and serve at least 2 months.
*   Posts are reserved category-wise as per Haryana Government Reservation policy.

**District-wise Vacancies:**
See the original notification for a detailed breakdown of vacancies across 22 districts.

**Important Links:**

[Official Website](https://nhmharyana.gov.in)

website_content.title: PSSSB Physical Test 2026 - Jail Warder, Asst. Superintendent & Matron
website_content.markdown_content:
## PSSSB Physical Test 2026 - Jail Warder, Assistant Superintendent & Matron

The Punjab Subordinate Services Selection Board (PSSSB) has announced the schedule for the Physical Measurement Test (PMT) & Physical Efficiency Test (PET) for Jail Warder, Assistant Superintendent Jail, and Matron posts.

**Key Details:**

*   **Recruiting Body:** Punjab Subordinate Services Selection Board (PSSSB)
*   **Post Names:** Jail Warder, Assistant Superintendent Jail, Matron
*   **Notice Release Date:** 06 April 2026
*   **Physical Test Period:** 20 April 2026 to 29 April 2026
*   **Written Exam Dates:** 11 January 2026 (Warder & Matron) / 18 January 2026 (Assistant Superintendent)
*   **Venue:** Polo Ground, Stadium Road, Patiala
*   **Selection Stages:** Written Test → PMT/PET → Document Verification → Medical Examination

**Important Instructions:**

*   Reach the venue before 9:00 AM (Gate closes at 11:00 AM).
*   Carry admit card, original ID, and required documents.
*   Wear appropriate sports attire.
*   No electronic devices allowed.

**Physical Standards (Highlights):**

*   **Jail Warder (Male):** Height - 5'7" (relaxation for Dogras/Gurkhas), Chest - 33" unexpanded / 34.5" expanded
*   **Matron (Female):** Height - 5'3", Weight - 50 Kg and above

**Schedule (Tentative):**

*   Jail Warder: 20-25 April 2026 (main) + 27-29 April (reserved categories)
*   Assistant Superintendent Jail: 27 April 2026
*   Matron: 27 April 2026

For detailed information, including specific PET criteria and shortlisted candidate lists, refer to the official website.

website_content.markdown_content:
## HPRCA Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026

The Himachal Pradesh Rajya Chayan Aayog (HPRCA) has announced a recruitment notification for **149 Junior Engineer** posts.

**Key Details:**

*   **Post Date:** 06-04-2026
*   **Total Vacancies:** 149
*   **Application Start Date:** 10-04-2026
*   **Application Last Date:** 02-05-2026
*   **Application Fee:** ₹800 (₹100 examination fee + ₹700 processing fee) for all categories; ₹100 correction fee.
*   **Age Limit:** 18-45 years (as of 01-01-2026). Age relaxation applicable for reserved categories.
*   **Qualification:** B.Tech/B.E or Diploma in Civil Engineering from an AICTE/UGC recognized institution.
*   **Pay Scale:** ₹23,500/- (Job Trainee)
*   **Selection Process:** Computer Based Test (CBT) followed by Document Verification.
*   **CBT Marks:** 120 Marks, 1.5 hours duration, 120 MCQs.

**Important Note:** Candidates must be registered on the OTR portal before applying.

For detailed information, refer to the official notification.

*   **Duration:** 1 Hour

**How to Download Admit Card:**
1.  Visit the official GPSSB website: gpssb.gujarat.gov.in
2.  Click on the link for “Announcement No. 12/2025-26 – MPHW (Male) Call Letter”.
3.  Login using your Registration Number and Date of Birth (or Password).
4.  Download and print the admit card.

**Documents Required:**
*   GPSSB MPHW Admit Card 2026 (printed copy)
*   Valid Photo ID Proof (Aadhaar Card, Voter ID, Driving License, PAN Card, Passport)
*   1-2 Recent passport-size photographs

**Important Instructions:**
*   No mobile phones or electronic devices allowed.
*   No study materials or calculators permitted.
*   Reach the exam center by 09:45 AM sharp.

**For any issues, contact the GPSSB helpdesk.**

website_content.title: PSSSB Group D Answer Key 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## PSSSB Group D Answer Key 2026 Released!

The Punjab Subordinate Services Selection Board (PSSSB) has released the answer key for the Group D examination held on April 5th, 2026. Candidates can now download the provisional answer key from the official website.

**Key Details:**

*   **Organization:** Punjab Subordinate Services Selection Board (PSSSB)
*   **Post Name:** Group D (Attendant, Watchman, Office Helper, Laboratory Attendant, etc.)
*   **Total Vacancies:** 406
*   **Exam Date:** April 5th, 2026
*   **Answer Key Status:** Released (April 5th, 2026)
*   **Objection Fee:** ₹50 per objection (via Demand Draft)

**Important Dates:**

*   **Exam Conducted:** April 5th, 2026
*   **Answer Key Released:** April 5th, 2026
*   **Final Answer Key (Expected):** April 2026
*   **Result Declaration (Expected):** April/May 2026

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit sssb.punjab.gov.in
2.  Navigate to the “Results/Answer Keys” or “Latest Notices” section.
3.  Click on “Group D Answer Key 2026 (Advt. 08/2025)”.
4.  Select your exam set (A, B, C, or D) and download the PDF.

**Objection Process:**

1.  Download the Objection Form from sssb.punjab.gov.in.
2.  Fill the form with details and supporting documents.
3.  Submit a Demand Draft of ₹50 per objection.
4.  Send via email (official email to be announced) and hard copy to the address provided.

**Marking Scheme:**

*   Correct Answer: +1 mark
*   Wrong Answer: -0.25 mark

website_content.title: CSIR-UGC NET June 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## CSIR-UGC NET June 2026 Application Form

**Application Form Date:** Expected to open in May 2026

**Official Website:** csirnet.nta.ac.in

This guide provides everything aspirants need for the Joint CSIR-UGC NET June 2026 exam (conducted by NTA for JRF and Lectureship/Assistant Professor).

**Exam Overview:**
*   **Exam Name:** Joint CSIR-UGC NET June 2026
*   **Conducting Body:** National Testing Agency (NTA)
*   **Exam Level:** National
*   **Purpose:** Junior Research Fellowship (JRF) & Lectureship/Assistant Professor
*   **Application Mode:** Online
*   **Exam Mode:** Computer-Based Test (CBT)
*   **Subjects:** Chemical Sciences, Earth Sciences, Life Sciences, Mathematical Sciences, Physical Sciences

**Important Dates (Tentative):**
*   **Notification Release:** May 2026
*   **Application Form Start:** May 2026
*   **Last Date to Submit Application:** June 2026
*   **Application Correction Window:** June 2026
*   **Admit Card Release:** June 2026
*   **Exam Date:** June–July 2026
*   **Result Declaration:** September 2026

**Eligibility Criteria:**
*   **Educational Qualification:** M.Sc. / Equivalent degree
*   **Minimum Marks:** General/OBC: 55%, SC/ST/PwD: 50%
*   **Age Limit (JRF):** Maximum 28 years (as of July 1st, 2026)
*   **Age Limit (Lectureship):** No upper age limit
*   **Relaxation:** 5 years for SC/ST/OBC-NCL/PwD/Female candidates

**Application Fee:**
*   **General:** ₹1150
*   **General-EWS / OBC-NCL:** ₹600
*   **SC / ST / PwD / Third Gender:** ₹325

**Exam Pattern:**
*   **Mode:** Computer-Based Test (CBT)
*   **Duration:** 180 minutes (3 hours)
*   **Total Marks:** 200
*   **Question Type:** Multiple Choice Questions (MCQs)
*   **Negative Marking:** Yes
*   **Sections:** Part A (General Aptitude) + Part B + Part C (Subject-specific)

website_content.title: Assam Rifles Recruitment 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## Assam Rifles Recruitment 2026 - 117 Vacancies

**Short Notification**

The Assam Rifles has released a short notification for the recruitment of 117 posts including Havildar Clerk, Rifleman Mason, and more.

**Key Details:**

*   **Total Vacancies:** 117
*   **Posts:** Havildar Clerk, Rifleman Mason, Rifleman/Riflewoman General Duty, Warrant Officer Cipher, and others (see details below).
*   **Eligibility:** Diploma, ITI qualifications required.
*   **Application Mode:** Offline (by post) or Email.
*   **Last Date to Apply:** 11-05-2026
*   **Age Limit:** As per Assam Rifles rules (Cut-off date: 01-01-2026)
*   **Application Fee:** Nil

**Vacancy Breakdown:**

*   Rifleman/Riflewoman General Duty (GD) (Male & Female): 95
*   Warrant Officer Cipher (Male only): 06
*   Havildar Clerk (Male & Female): 03
*   Rifleman Electrical Fitter Signal (EFS) (Male only): 02
*   Rifleman Lineman (Lmn) Field (Male only): 01
*   Rifleman Armourer (Male only): 02
*   Rifleman Recovery Vehicle Mechanic (Male only): 01
*   Rifleman Electrician Mechanic Vehicle (EMV) (Male only): 01
*   Rifleman Metalsmith (Male only): 01
*   Rifleman Mason (Male only): 02
*   Rifleman Store Keeper Technical (Electrical Mechanical Engineer) (Male only): 01
*   Rifleman Vehicle Mechanic (VM) (Male only): 01
*   Rifleman Engineer Equipment Mechanic (Male only): 01

**Selection Process:** Based on verification of eligibility under the Compassionate Ground Appointment Scheme. No written exam.

**Recruitment Rally:** Tentatively scheduled in Jul/Aug 2026 at Lokhra (Assam).

**How to Apply:**

1.  Download the application format from [assamrifles.gov.in](assamrifles.gov.in).
2.  Fill the form and attach self-attested copies of required documents.
3.  Send the application via post or email to rectdrdgar@gmail.com.

**Important Note:** This recruitment is for dependent family members of Assam Rifles personnel under the Compassionate Ground Appointment Scheme.

The Uttarakhand Public Service Commission (UKPSC) has released the admit card for the Civil Judge (Junior Division) Mains Examination 2023. Candidates who qualified for the main exam can download their hall ticket from the official website.

**Important Dates:**
*   **Release Date:** 06 April 2026
*   **Exam Dates:** 21 April - 24 April 2026

1.  Visit the official website: psc.uk.gov.in
2.  Navigate to the "Admit Card" or "Candidate Corner" section.
3.  Click on "UKPSC Civil Judge Mains Admit Card 2026".

website_content.title: Delhi EWS/DG/CWSN Admission Result 2026-27
website_content.markdown_content:
## Delhi EWS/DG/CWSN Admission Result 2026-27 Released

The Department of Education, Government of NCT of Delhi, has released the first round allotment list for admission under the Economically Weaker Section (EWS), Disadvantaged Group (DG), and Children with Special Needs (CWSN) categories for the academic session 2026-27.

**Key Details:**

*   **Result Name:** Delhi EWS DG CWSN Admission Result 2026-27
*   **Session:** 2026-27
*   **Release Date:** 6th April 2026
*   **Categories:** EWS, DG, CWSN
*   **Official Website:** [edudel.nic.in](http://edudel.nic.in)

**How to Check:**

1.  Visit the official website: [ewsadmissions.delhi.gov.in](http://ewsadmissions.delhi.gov.in).
2.  Click on the link for the First Round Allotment Result 2026-27.
3.  Enter your Application Number and Captcha code.
4.  Submit the details to view your allotment result.

Parents are advised to verify all details carefully and report to the allotted school within the given timeline. Contact the helpline for any discrepancies.

website_content.title: UGC NET Final Answer Key 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## UGC NET Final Answer Key 2026 - Details

The final answer key for the UGC NET December 2025 exam (result in 2026) has been released by the National Testing Agency (NTA). This key is the official reference for result calculation for both Paper 1 (General) and Paper 2 (Subject-specific).

**Key Dates:**
*   **Exam Dates:** 31 December 2025 - 7 January 2026
*   **Provisional Answer Key Release:** 14 January 2026
*   **Objection Window:** 14 January - 17 January 2026
*   **Final Answer Key Release:** 4 February 2026 (Revised for some subjects on 3 April 2026)

**How to Download:**
1.  Visit the official UGC NET website: [ugcnet.nta.nic.in](https://ugcnet.nta.nic.in).
2.  Navigate to the “Latest News” or “Answer Key” section.
3.  Click on the link for “UGC NET Final Answer Key 2026 (December 2025 Session)” or “Revised Final Answer Key”.

**Calculating Your Score:**
*   Download the final answer key and your response sheet.
*   Compare your answers to the correct options.
*   Count correct answers for each paper.
*   Multiply correct answers by marks per question.
*   Add scores for both papers to get your combined UGC NET score.

**Important Note:** The final answer key cannot be challenged. Results are based solely on this key.

website_content.title: Gram Panchayat Secretary Merit List 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## District Panchayat Uttar Bastar Kanker - Gram Panchayat Secretary Final Merit List 2026

The District Panchayat Uttar Bastar Kanker (Chhattisgarh) has released the Final Merit List for Gram Panchayat Secretary (Panchayat Karmi) posts on **5th April 2026**. 

**Key Details:**

*   **Recruiting Body:** District Panchayat Uttar Bastar Kanker (North Bastar Kanker), Chhattisgarh
*   **Post Name:** Gram Panchayat Secretary (Panchayat Karmi)
*   **Result Type:** Final Merit List
*   **Release Date:** 5th April 2026
*   **Official Website:** [kanker.gov.in](kanker.gov.in)

**How to Check:**

1.  Visit [kanker.gov.in](kanker.gov.in)
2.  Navigate to the "Notices" or "Recruitment" section.
3.  Find the link for "Final Merit List for Recruitment to the Post of Gram Panchayat Secretary (Panchayat Karmi)".
4.  Download the PDF and search for your name/roll number (Ctrl+F).

**Merit List Contains:**

*   Serial Number
*   Candidate Name
*   Father's/Husband's Name
*   Category (UR/OBC/SC/ST/EWS)
*   Date of Birth
*   Marks/Score Details
*   Final Rank/Position
*   Remarks (if any)

**Important Instructions:**

*   Download and save the PDF.
*   Take printouts for future reference.
*   Keep original documents ready for verification.
*   Check the website regularly for joining orders.

*   MN Sem 4 Remedial
*   MN Sem 5 Regular
